These findings show that safe tool use requires not only selecting the correct tool, but also reliably binding natural-language references to the correct real-world entity before action.

</details>


### [374] [Latent Actions from Factorized Transition Effects under Agent Ambiguity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30544)
*Heejeong Nam,Chandradithya S Jonnalagadda,Harshit Aggarwal,Eric Xu,Randall Balestriero*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出Observed Transition Factorization (OTF)，将视觉过渡分解为稀疏的可观测过渡原型，以提升在多物体或干扰丰富的场景中动作类潜在变量的鲁棒性。OTF-LAM和OTF-LAM-Dino通过这些原型构建动作类潜变量，在复杂过渡模糊情况下表现优于基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在多物体或干扰丰富的场景中，传统隐动作模型（LAMs）因视觉变化来源混杂（如背景、相机运动、干扰物等），导致动作源不明确，缺乏监督时难以准确建模。需要一种方法分离出可重用的过渡效应，以增强动作类潜变量的鲁棒性。

Method: 引入观测过渡因子分解（OTF），将每个状态转移分解为一组稀疏的可观测过渡原型。基于这些原型，提出OTF-LAM（使用标准逆-前向动力学框架抽象运动原型为动作类潜变量）和OTF-LAM-Dino（无需解码器，直接在冻结的DINOv2表示空间中预测未来状态）。

Result: OTF原型在控制载体和形态变化下实现零样本迁移，表现出良好可重用性；下游策略学习性能与现有方法相当或更优，尤其在高过渡模糊场景中优势明显。

Conclusion: OTF通过分解观测过渡为可重用的原型，显著提升了动作类潜变量在复杂环境中的鲁棒性和泛化能力，为无监督动作建模提供了有效新范式。

Abstract: Latent Action Models (LAMs) learn action-like proxies from observation transitions. However, in multi-object or distractor-rich scenes, these visual effects mix agent motion with distractors, camera dynamics, and background changes, making the underlying action source ambiguous without supervision. Structuring this mixture as reusable transition effects provides an intermediate representation from which action-like latents can be more robustly formed. We introduce Observed Transition Factorization (OTF), which decomposes each transition into a sparse set of observed transition primitives. Using these primitives as the transition interface, we propose OTF-LAM, which abstracts motion primitives into action-like latents within the standard inverse-forward dynamics framework, and OTF-LAM-Dino, a decoder-free variant that predicts future states in a frozen DINOv2 representation space. Empirically, OTF primitives transfer zeroshot across controlled carrier and morphology shifts, showing reusability. Furthermore, downstream policy learning results match or outperform baselines under complex transition ambiguity.

</details>


### [375] [Linguistic Firewall: Geometry as Defense in Multi-Agent Systems Routing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30555)
*Dvir Alsheich,Adar Peleg,Ben Hagag,Rom Himelstein,Amit Levi,Avi Mendelson*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: ANTAP 是一种基于评估的自动非文本代理选择架构，通过动态测试代理的真实能力，摒弃了依赖文本描述或静态表示的间接代理，实现了更安全、可靠的多智能体系统任务路由。它在推理时采用非文本代数投影，构建“语言防火墙”，有效抵御基于元数据的攻击，在对抗描述注入和嵌入攻击方面显著优于传统基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有路由机制依赖不可验证的文本描述或静态表示来评估代理能力，导致能力与实际表现之间存在巨大差距，易被恶意代理利用进行欺骗或植入后门，存在严重安全隐患。

Method: ANTAP 通过动态查询代理以实证方式获取其真实能力，将性能提炼为共享语义空间中的固定行为算子，并在推理阶段使用非文本代数投影进行路由，实现无文本依赖的能力评估。

Result: 实验表明，ANTAP 在对抗基于描述的注入攻击时，攻击成功率（ASR）接近零，而基线方法高达67.3%以上；在对抗自适应嵌入攻击时，相比基线降低20%的ASR，且对描述篡改具有天然鲁棒性。

Conclusion: ANTAP 通过主动能力测试和非文本化路由机制，有效弥合了代理能力评估中的理论与实践差距，显著提升了多智能体系统的安全性与可靠性，为未来安全高效的智能体协作提供了新范式。

Abstract: The rapid integration of Large Language Models (LLMs) has driven the evolution of Multi-Agent Systems (MAS), where specialized agents collaborate to execute complex workflows. Effective orchestration in these environments requires robust routing mechanisms to efficiently allocate tasks to the most suitable agent. However, existing routers fundamentally rely on unverified proxies, ranging from textual self-descriptions to static surrogate representations, to gauge an agent's competence. This reliance on non-empirical data creates a critical gap between an agent's projected profile and its actual operational capabilities, introducing severe security vulnerabilities. Malicious agents can easily misrepresent their proficiencies or harbor covert backdoors that evade both standard external analysis and static representation-learning techniques. In this work, we introduce ANTAP (Automatic Non-Textual Agent Picker), an evaluation-driven routing architecture that discards indirect proxies in favor of active capability testing. By dynamically querying agents to ascertain their true competencies empirically, ANTAP distills performance into fixed behavioral operators within a shared semantic space. At inference time, routing is performed via a purely non-textual algebraic projection, establishing a "linguistic firewall" that renders metadata-based attacks inexpressible. In our experiments, ANTAP achieves near-zero ASR against description-based injection attacks, compared to 67.3\% and above for the description-based router baseline. Against adaptive embedding attacks, ANTAP achieves substantially lower ASR than the embedding-based baseline, with a 20\% reduction, while remaining resilient to description manipulation by design.

</details>


### [376] [The Human Creativity Benchmark](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30561)
*Aspen Hopkins,Allison Nulty,Alexandria Minetti,Anoop Pakki,Angad Singh*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出在创意领域中，AI评估不应将专家分歧视为噪声，而应区分‘共识’（收敛）与‘差异’（发散）。为此，作者构建了人类创造力基准（HCB），通过成对偏好、评分及定性理由收集专业意见。分析显示，共识集中在技术正确性和视觉层次等可验证维度，而差异则体现在审美方向和概念风险等主观判断上。没有模型在所有阶段表现均优。单一质量指标会丢失关键信息：哪些方面需准确，哪些应保持可引导性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前AI评估框架将专家分歧视为测量误差并试图消除，但在创意领域，这种分歧反映的是真实品味差异而非错误。因此，需要一种能区分共识与个体偏好的评估方法，以更准确地指导AI生成过程。

Method: 构建人类创造力基准（HCB），收集跨五个创意领域、三个工作流程阶段（构思、原型、优化）的15,000份专业判断，包含成对偏好、标量评分（提示契合度、可用性、视觉吸引力）及定性理由，分离收敛与发散信号。

Result: 共识主要出现在技术正确性、视觉层次等可验证维度；差异集中于审美方向、概念风险等主观维度。无模型在所有阶段表现全面领先。将两种信号合并为单一指标会损失关键信息，即模型应在何处精确，何处应保持可调控性。

Conclusion: 创意AI的评估应保留收敛与发散两个信号，避免将专家分歧简单归为噪声。使用多维评估框架能更有效地指导模型改进，明确其在不同阶段的应然表现——既需准确，也应可引导。

Abstract: Modern AI evaluation frameworks treat evaluator disagreement as noise to be resolved. In creative domains, professional disagreement reflects genuine differences in taste, not measurement error. We argue that evaluating creative AI requires preserving two distinct signals: convergence, where professionals align around shared best practices, and divergence, where individual taste legitimately varies. We present the Human Creativity Benchmark (HCB), a benchmark that operationalizes this separation by collecting pairwise preferences, scalar ratings on prompt adherence, usability, and visual appeal, and qualitative rationale from domain professionals. Across 15,000 professional judgments spanning five creative domains and three workflow phases (ideation, mockup, refinement), we find that convergence concentrates on verifiable dimensions like technical correctness and visual hierarchy, while divergence concentrates on taste-driven dimensions like aesthetic direction and conceptual risk. No model excels uniformly across all phases. Collapsing these signals into a single quality metric discards the most actionable information: where models must be correct versus where they should remain steerable.

</details>


### [377] [DOPD: Dual On-policy Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30626)
*Xinlei Yu,Gen Li,Qingyi Si,Guibin Zhang,Yuqi Xu,Congcong Wang,Shuai Dong,Kaiwen Tuo,Xiangyu Zeng,Kaituo Feng,Qunzhong Wang,Yang Shi,Xiaobin Hu,Xiangyu Yue,Jiaqi Wang,Shuicheng Yan*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: DOPD提出了一种基于优势感知的双重蒸馏范式，通过动态路由token级监督信号，在特权教师和特权学生之间根据优势差距和相对概率进行选择，以缓解特权幻觉问题。该方法在大语言模型和视觉-语言模型上均显著优于基线方法，并在稳定性、鲁棒性、持续学习和分布外任务中表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于策略的蒸馏（OPD）虽然能有效传递能力，但引入特权信息后可能引发‘特权幻觉’——即混淆可迁移能力差距与信息不对称差距，导致学生无法真正掌握核心能力。此外，token级监督的非均匀性使得仅有少数关键token携带重要信号，进一步加剧了这一问题。

Method: 提出DOPD（优势感知双重蒸馏），通过计算教师与学生之间的优势差距及相对概率，动态决定每个token应接收来自教师还是学生自身的监督信号，实现不同强度、目标和策略的监督分配。

Result: 在大语言模型和视觉-语言模型任务上，DOPD consistently 超越Vanilla OPD及其他对比方法；在稳定性、鲁棒性、持续学习和分布外泛化任务中也表现出更强性能。

Conclusion: DOPD通过智能路由监督信号，有效缓解了特权幻觉问题，实现了更可信的能力迁移，为高阶知识蒸馏提供了新范式。

Abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) offers superior capacity transfer by supervising student-sampled trajectories with dense token-level signals. To furnish high-quality supervision sources and thereby elevate the performance frontier of distillation, an intuitive direction is to infuse privileged information to either teacher or student itself. However, this additional input induces a potential failure mode we dub privilege illusion: a pattern that conflates the transferable capability gap that students are meant to close, and the information asymmetry gap that can only be mimicked but never replicated. This issue is further amplified by the inherent non-uniformity of token-level supervision, where only a small subset of tokens carries pivotal capability-bearing signals. To this end, we propose DOPD, an advantage-aware dual distillation paradigm that dynamically routes token-level supervision between privileged teacher and privileged student policies based on their advantage gap and relative probabilities. Each token receives supervision of different strength, objective, and strategy from either teacher or student itself, which transfers credible capability while simultaneously receiving auxiliary signals, to alleviate privilege illusion. Extensive experiments on both large language model (LLM) and vision-language model (VLM) settings demonstrate that DOPD consistently outperforms Vanilla OPD and other counterparts. Further results on stability, robustness, continual learning, and out-of-distribution tasks validate its superiority.

</details>


### [378] [Self-Evolving World Models for LLM Agent Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30639)
*Xuan Zhang,Wenxuan Zhang,See-Kiong Ng,Yang Deng*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: WorldEvolver 是一个自进化世界模型框架，通过部署时的上下文修订，在不改变下游代理和模型参数的前提下，提升长时程 LLM 代理的预见能力。它结合了情景记忆（基于检索的模拟）、语义记忆（从预测-观察差异中提取持久启发式规则）和选择性预见（过滤低置信度预测），在 ALFWorld 和 ScienceWorld 上实现了最高的预测准确率和下游代理成功率，验证了测试时记忆修订对预测精度与规划性能的双重提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有世界模型在部署时可能因不可靠的预见性导致决策质量下降，因此需要一种机制在不修改模型参数的情况下动态优化其上下文，以提升预见性和决策可靠性。

Method: WorldEvolver 采用三个模块：(i) 情景记忆，利用真实动作转移进行检索式模拟；(ii) 语义记忆，从预测与观察的偏差中提取持久启发式规则；(iii) 选择性预见，筛选低置信度预测后整合进代理推理上下文。整个过程在部署时动态完成，模型参数保持冻结。

Result: 在 ALFWorld 和 ScienceWorld 的评估中，WorldEvolver 在三种骨干网络上均达到最高预测准确率，并显著提升下游代理的成功率，表明测试时记忆修订能有效增强预测保真度与规划性能。

Conclusion: WorldEvolver 证明了在不修改模型参数的前提下，通过测试时记忆修订可显著提升世界模型的预测能力和下游任务表现，为长时程智能体提供更可靠、可进化的能力。

Abstract: World models offer a principled way to equip long-horizon LLM agents with foresight: predictions of action consequences before execution. However, unreliable foresight can be ignored, misused, or even degrade downstream decision-making. In this paper, we introduce WorldEvolver, a self-evolving world model framework that revises its deployment-time context while keeping the downstream agent and all model parameters frozen. WorldEvolver integrates three modules: (i) Episodic Memory, which exploits real action transitions through retrieval-based simulation; (ii) Semantic Memory, which extracts persistent heuristic rules from prediction-observation mismatches; and (iii) Selective Foresight, which filters low-confidence predictions before integrating them into agent reasoning context. We evaluate WorldEvolver on ALFWorld and ScienceWorld, measuring world model prediction accuracy on Word2World and downstream agent success rate on AgentBoard. Extensive experiments show that WorldEvolver achieves the highest prediction accuracy across three backbones and leads other world model baselines on downstream agent success rate, demonstrating that test-time memory revision enhances both predictive fidelity and planning performance.

</details>


<div id='cs.LG'></div>

# cs.LG [[Back]](#toc)

### [379] [Can AI Draw Science? A Benchmark for Evaluating Scientific Figure Generation by Text-to-Image and Multimodal Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28406)
*Davie Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出SciDraw-Bench基准，评估科学图表生成的准确性与合规性，涵盖8种图类型和10个学科，引入四维评估协议（文本保真度、语义正确性、结构质量、规范遵循），并验证领域专用模型SciDraw AI优于通用模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有图像生成基准不适用于评估科学图表的可用性，如文本标签正确性、实体及其关系的忠实描绘、图表结构连贯性及学科绘图惯例遵守情况。

Method: 构建包含32个任务的SciDraw-Bench基准，每项任务配有自然语言提示与可机器检验的规范（包括标签、关系、组件、惯例及负向约束）；设计四维评估协议，并进行人工评分可靠性分析。

Result: 在所有八类科学图中，领域专用系统SciDraw AI在各项维度上均显著优于通用模型，尤其在语义正确性和规范遵循方面差距最大；文本保真度对所有系统仍是难点。

Conclusion: SciDraw-Bench为科学图表生成提供了首个系统性评估框架，证明领域专用模型在提升科学图生成质量方面的优势，强调未来需加强文本识别与语义理解能力。

Abstract: Text-to-image and multimodal generative models are increasingly used to produce scientific figures such as mechanism diagrams, experimental-design schematics, conceptual frameworks, and graphical abstracts. Yet existing image-generation benchmarks (e.g., GenEval, T2I-CompBench, DPG-Bench) evaluate natural images and measure compositionality, object counting, or photorealism. None of them measure what makes a generated scientific figure usable: correct and legible text labels, faithful depiction of entities and their relations, coherent diagrammatic structure, and adherence to disciplinary drawing conventions. We introduce SciDraw-Bench, a benchmark of 32 structured scientific-figure generation tasks spanning eight figure types and ten disciplines, where each task pairs a natural-language prompt with a machine-checkable specification of required labels, relations, components, conventions, and negative constraints. We propose a four-dimensional evaluation protocol: Text Fidelity (OCR-based label recall and character error rate), Semantic Correctness (vision-language-model judging against the specification), Structural Quality, and Convention Adherence, together with a meta-evaluation protocol and a preliminary inter-judge reliability analysis (human-rating validation is ongoing). We evaluate a domain-specific system, SciDraw AI, against representative general-purpose text-to-image models, and outline a code-to-figure baseline as a planned extension. In a pilot over all eight figure types, the domain-specific system substantially outperforms the general-purpose baselines on every dimension and figure type, with the largest gaps on semantic correctness and convention adherence; text fidelity remains the hardest dimension for all systems.

</details>


### [380] [On the Necessity of a Liquid Substrate for Mesh Intelligence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28413)
*Hongwei Xu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了在无中心、无共享时钟、无协调者的情况下，由主权代理构成的网格系统如何通过在线融合异步观测实现智能。提出两个必要条件：一是随时间变化的自适应时标（固定增益滤波器严格次优），二是依赖于事件间间隔的估计（与网络宽度或深度无关）。这两个条件共同指向连续时间液态网络（liquid network）类。实验验证了这些性质，表明该结构是固定权重系统中实现最优融合的必要条件，对整个网格智能具有结构性约束。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在无中心、无共享模型、无协调者的自主代理网格中，如何实现高效、实时的状态融合是一个关键挑战。现有方法难以同时满足异步观测、不可重训练权重和动态时变估计的需求，因此需要探索其内在的必要结构条件。

Method: 基于一个自演化潜在变量模型，分析在异步、外生到达时间下的最优估计问题，推导出时间可变性与时间间隔依赖性的必要条件，并通过理论证明和合成实验验证连续时间液态网络在满足这两项条件上的有效性。

Result: 证明了自适应时标和间隔依赖性是实现最优融合的必要条件；合成实验确认多时标液态网络能准确捕获时标并计算时间间隔差异；该特性为固定权重系统所必需，且适用于每个代理，构成对网格智能的结构性限制。

Conclusion: 在异步、无中心、不可重训练的代理网格中，最优状态融合要求系统具备自适应时标和时间间隔依赖能力，只有连续时间液态网络等特定结构能满足这些必要条件，这构成了对分布式智能系统的根本性结构约束。

Abstract: A mesh of sovereign agents has no center: no shared clock, no shared model, and no coordinator to gather data or retrain. Its competence rests on each agent folding the projections its peers emit into a single internal state, online, from observations that arrive at irregular, unscheduled times, on a substrate whose weights it cannot retrain. Any one of these constraints is tractable on its own; folding optimally under all three at once is not. We ask what such a substrate must be, and prove two necessary conditions from one model of a self-evolving latent observed at irregular, exogenous times. Because the latent changes, its optimal estimator is time-varying: an adaptive timescale is necessary, and every fixed-gain filter is strictly suboptimal. And because arrivals are clock-free, the optimal estimate depends on the elapsed gap between them, which no gap-blind network recovers at any width or depth. This second condition is capacity-independent: scale cannot substitute for the missing dependence. The two conditions intersect in the continuous-time liquid class. An LSTM satisfies the first, a fixed continuous-time filter the second, and a multi-timescale liquid network both. Synthetic experiments confirm each: the network attains the timescale, and the separation is computed exactly. The characterization is necessary, not sufficient, and binds fixed-weight substrates: a network free to retrain reaches the class by other means. Proved per agent, the necessity binds every agent of a mesh, a structural condition on mesh intelligence.

</details>


### [381] [Position: RL Researchers Need to Distinguish Between Solving Simulators and Using Simulators as a Proxy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28433)
*Matthew Vandergrift,Esraa Elelimy,Martha White*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文呼吁强化学习（RL）研究者明确区分模拟器的两种用途：一是为了解决模拟器本身，二是将模拟器作为部署环境中学习的代理。作者指出，这两种用途在约束条件、适用算法和评估指标上存在根本差异，并强调混淆二者可能导致错误结论。文章通过实例和简单实验说明了不加区分可能引发的问题，旨在推动社区在研究中清晰界定模拟器的使用场景，促进对不同情境下最佳实证实践的讨论。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前强化学习研究中，研究人员可能过度专注于在模拟器中取得高分，而忽视了真实部署环境中的通用序列决策能力。这种倾向导致研究目标从‘学习如何在真实世界中有效决策’转变为‘专门解决模拟器’，从而偏离了实际应用的目标。因此，需要明确区分模拟器的两种用途，以避免误导性结论。

Method: 通过理论分析与简单实验，对比两种使用模拟器的情境——解决模拟器与使用模拟器作为部署学习的代理，探讨其在约束条件、算法选择和评估标准上的差异，并举例说明混淆两者可能带来的问题。

Result: 研究发现，若不区分模拟器的两种用途，容易导致采用仅适用于模拟器的算法或评价方式，从而产生误导性的性能提升结果；这会削弱研究对真实部署场景的实际意义。

Conclusion: 强化学习研究应明确区分模拟器的两种用途：解决模拟器与作为部署学习的代理。只有这样，才能确保研究设计合理、评估有效，并推动真正具有泛化能力的智能体发展。本文呼吁学术界提高意识，规范模拟器使用语境，以促进更可信的研究实践。

Abstract: One goal in reinforcement learning (RL) research is to understand general-purpose sequential decision-making, using benchmark simulators as a proxy for learning in deployment settings. When running experiments, however, the goal of achieving high performance in the simulator can mutate into focusing exclusively on solving the simulator. To achieve high scores, researchers may adopt solutions exclusively meant for solving simulators, rather than learning while the agent is deployed outside a simulator. Solving simulators is also worthy of investigation, but it is a fundamentally different RL research question. In this paper, we argue that RL researchers need to distinguish between two use cases of simulators: solving simulators and using simulators as a proxy for learning in deployment. We first discuss how these two use-cases are importantly different, in terms of constraints on how the agent can use the simulator, which algorithms are appropriate, and which evaluation metrics are appropriate. We then highlight several issues and misleading conclusions that can occur by not making the distinction between these two settings clear, supported with examples and simple experiments. This work is a call to the community to begin clearly distinguishing how they are using simulators in their work, hopefully sparking further discussion on which empirical practices work best in each setting.

</details>


### [382] [Learning to Distributedly Estimate under Partially Known Dynamics: A Covariance-Agnostic Neural Kalman Consensus Filter](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28441)
*George Stamatelis,Kyriakos Stylianopoulos,George C. Alexandropoulos*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种新型的在线分布式感知框架CA-NKCF，结合先验知识与深度神经网络表示能力，通过优化共识权重和类似卡尔曼的递归更新实现去协方差的分布式推断，无需依赖噪声统计信息。在线性、混沌（洛伦兹）及实际无线追踪场景中，该方法优于传统分布式卡尔曼滤波、粒子滤波及纯模型无关的深度神经网络，在多种复杂条件下均表现出稳健性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决在线潜在状态估计中的挑战，尤其是在缺乏噪声统计信息和模型不准确的情况下，提升分布式系统中的状态推断精度与鲁棒性。

Method: 设计了融合先验估计、优化共识权重和卡尔曼类似递归更新的分布式感知框架，利用深度神经网络增强表示能力，并通过去协方差机制实现无需噪声先验的实时推断。

Result: 在多种环境（线性、混沌、无线追踪）下，CA-NKCF显著优于传统滤波方法和纯数据驱动模型，对噪声水平、通信拓扑、状态维度和观测杂波密度变化具有强鲁棒性。

Conclusion: CA-NKCF是一种高效且鲁棒的在线分布式潜在状态估计算法，适用于复杂动态环境，尤其在模型不精确或噪声未知时表现优异，为智能系统中的实时感知提供了新范式。

Abstract: Online latent state estimation constitutes a fundamental challenge within the artificial intelligence field, serving as a foundational tool for diverse applications, including sequential decision making, anomaly and change-point detection. In this paper, a novel online distributed sensing framework, where agents collaborate and exchange information to perform latent state estimation, is presented. The proposed estimator combines available partial domain knowledge with the representation capabilities of deep neural networks. In particular, the designed sensing framework incorporates prior estimates, optimized consensus weights, and Kalman-like recursive updates to perform decentralized inference, without relying on knowledge of noise statistics. Extensive experiments on linear, chaotic (Lorenz), and practical wireless tracking environments reveal that the proposed Covariance-Agnostic Neural Kalman Consensus Filter (CA-NKCF) outperforms traditional distributed Kalman and particle filters as well as purely model-free deep neural networks, exhibiting robustness even when the underlying motion and observation models are misspecified. It is also demonstrated that CA-NKCF's performance advantage remains stable across varying noise levels, random communication topologies, latent state dimensions, and observation clutter densities induced by scattering objects in wireless systems.

</details>


### [383] [S-GAI: Spectral Geometry-Aware Initialization for Sigmoidal MLPs -- From Dataset Geometry to Network Weights](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28444)
*Yi-Shan Chu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出S-GAI框架，通过谱几何感知初始化，将图像数据的类别谱几何信息编码到单隐层S型MLP中，利用SVD提取类均值、主方向和谱尺度，以双S型门表示每个保留方向，形成共享隐藏层。实验表明该方法在MNIST、Fashion-MNIST和CIFAR-10上初始状态更优，且冻结隐藏层时仍优于随机初始化，验证了其有效嵌入几何信息的能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典通用逼近定理未说明初始权重如何编码数据分布的几何结构，因此需要一种能基于数据几何信息进行合理初始化的方法，以提升神经网络的初始表达能力。

Method: 基于SVD估计每类的谱几何（均值、主方向、谱尺度），设定能量阈值筛选保留方向，每个方向由两个Sigmoid门表示，构建类特定的隐藏层；同时提出基于SVD的子空间分类器作为非神经几何参考，检验几何信息本身是否具备判别性。

Result: S-GAI初始化的MLP在训练初期具有更丰富的隐藏状态，达到与Xavier初始化相当的最终准确率；当隐藏层冻结时，仅训练输出层仍表现优于随机门初始化，证明其成功嵌入了类间谱几何特征。

Conclusion: S-GAI能够有效将图像数据的类间谱几何信息融入单隐层Sigmoid MLP的初始化中，显著提升初始表达能力，为几何感知初始化提供了新范式。

Abstract: Classical universal approximation theorems establish the expressive power of sigmoidal multilayer perceptrons, but they do not prescribe how initial weights should encode the geometry of a data distribution. We propose S-GAI, a spectral geometry-aware initialization framework for one-hidden-layer sigmoidal MLPs. Starting from the constructive idea that sigmoid units can act as smooth half-space gates, we move from hand-specified planar geometry to class-wise spectral geometry estimated from image data. For each class, SVD provides a mean, principal directions, and spectral scales. An energy threshold selects the retained directions, and each retained direction is represented by two sigmoid gates. These class-specific gates form a shared hidden layer initialized directly from the training set. We also formulate a SVD-based subspace classifier as a non-neural geometric reference, which tests whether the estimated spectral class geometry is already discriminative before being embedded into the MLP. Experiments on MNIST, Fashion-MNIST, and a more challenging CIFAR-10 test show that the S-GAI-initialized MLP starts from a substantially more informative hidden state than Xavier initialization and reaches comparable final accuracy under full training. When the hidden layer is frozen, training only the output layer still gives stronger performance than frozen random gates, providing evidence that S-GAI effectively embeds class-wise spectral geometry into the MLP.

</details>


### [384] [scKDGM: KAN-guided Dynamic Graph Masked Learning for Single-Cell RNA-seq Clustering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28459)
*Jun Tang,Pengwei Hu,Sicong Gao,Jie Guo,Lun Hu,Xin Luo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: scKDGM是一种基于KAN的动态图掩码学习框架，用于单细胞RNA测序聚类。它通过图感知的分布保持基因掩码（GDP-Mask）、KAN驱动的TAKGCN编码器、掩码引导的表达恢复和跨视图对比学习，实现更鲁棒的细胞图构建与聚类优化，并在12个真实数据集上优于10个基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在处理高维、稀疏、丢包和技术噪声时表现不佳，且多数掩码自编码器仅依赖表达恢复进行特征重建，而图聚类方法通常使用固定的KNN图，无法将恢复的表达反馈至图优化中。

Method: scKDGM采用图感知分布保持基因掩码（GDP-Mask）扰动细胞身份，利用KAN-based TAKGCN编码器学习掩码视图表示，通过掩码引导的表达恢复构建动态图，并结合跨视图对比学习将恢复信号传递至拓扑更新，同时使用ZINB损失函数建模过分散和零膨胀。

Result: 在12个真实scRNA-seq数据集上的实验表明，scKDGM在平均NMI和ARI指标上均优于10个基线方法，显示出更强的聚类性能和鲁棒性。

Conclusion: scKDGM通过动态图构建与掩码恢复的协同优化，显著提升了单细胞数据聚类的准确性与稳定性，为复杂单细胞表达数据的分析提供了新范式。

Abstract: Single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq) clustering is essential for identifying cell types, but high dimensionality, sparsity, dropout, and technical noise hinder robust expression representation and cell graph construction. Existing masked autoencoders mainly use expression recovery for feature reconstruction, while graph clustering methods usually depend on fixed KNN graphs and do not feed recovered expression back into graph optimization. We propose scKDGM, a KAN-guided dynamic graph masked learning framework for scRNA-seq clustering. scKDGM uses graph-aware distribution preserving gene masking (GDP-Mask) to perturb cell identity, a KAN-based TAKGCN encoder to learn masked-view representations, mask-guided expression recovery to construct a dynamic graph, and cross-view contrastive learning to transfer recovery signals into topology updates. A ZINB loss models overdispersion and zero inflation. Experiments on 12 real scRNA-seq datasets show that scKDGM outperforms 10 baselines in average NMI and ARI.

</details>


### [385] [Counterfactual Residual Data Augmentation for Regression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28460)
*Hossein Mohebbi,Oliver Schulte,Ke Li,Pascal Poupart*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为反事实残差数据增强（CRDA）的新技术，用于解决表格回归中因训练样本有限、收集成本高和观测噪声带来的挑战。该方法利用模型预测后的残差在小特征扰动下保持稳定的特点，生成新的真实感训练样本，从而扩展数据集而不需额外真实数据。CRDA具有模型无关性，适用于多种回归器。实验表明，相比基准方法，CRDA平均降低MLP回归器22.9%的均方误差（MSE），XGBoost回归器6.4%的MSE，且性能优于现有先进数据生成与增强技术。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实世界中的回归任务常面临训练样本少、数据收集成本高及观测噪声等问题。尽管数据增强在视觉和自然语言处理中取得成功，但在表格回归领域尚缺乏有效方法。因此需要一种能提升小样本、噪声数据环境下模型性能的数据增强策略。

Method: CRDA基于一个核心洞察：当回归器建模了数据的系统性成分后，剩余残差可视为在特定特征微小扰动下保持不变的不变量。通过在选定特征上施加有原则的反事实扰动，生成新样本以扩充训练集，同时保证样本的真实性和合理性。该方法不依赖具体模型，可广泛适配各类回归器。

Result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验显示，CRDA显著降低了回归模型的均方误差：平均使MLP回归器的MSE下降22.9%，XGBoost回归器下降6.4%。相较于现有最先进的数据生成与增强方法，CRDA在多数情况下表现更优，证明其在噪声强、样本少的场景中具备强大实用性。

Conclusion: CRDA是一种简单高效的数据增强方法，能够有效应对小样本、高噪声的表格回归问题。通过利用残差的不变性生成高质量合成数据，显著提升了多种回归模型的泛化能力，为实际应用提供了有力支持。

Abstract: Data-driven modeling in real-world regression tasks often suffers from limited training samples, high collection costs, and noisy observations. Inspired by the impact of data augmentation in vision and language, we propose a novel Counterfactual Residual Data Augmentation (CRDA) technique for tabular regression. Our key insight is that once a regressor has modeled the systematic component of the data, the remaining noise can be viewed as an invariant residual that remains stable under small perturbations of carefully selected features. We exploit this residual invariance to generate new, yet realistic, training samples, effectively expanding the dataset without requiring additional real data. Our method is model-agnostic and readily applicable to various types of regressors. In experiments across datasets from a variety of benchmark repositories, on average, CRDA reduces an MLP Regressor's MSE by 22.9% and an XGBoost Regressor's MSE by 6.4%. When compared to existing state-of-the-art data generators and augmentation techniques, CRDA consistently outperforms in MSE reduction. By adding principled counterfactual variations to the training data, our method offers a simple and efficient remedy for noise-prone, small-sample regression settings.

</details>


### [386] [Singular Learning and Occam's Razor in Deep Monomial Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28464)
*Kathlén Kohn,Giovanni Luca Marchetti,Farhan Shabir,Vahid Shahverdi,Weisheng Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了深度全连接网络中由多项式激活函数引起的临界点，利用多项式代数工具（如Mason定理）证明：当激活度足够大时，临界点恰好出现在子网络上，即某些神经元处于非活跃或冗余状态。这从数学上解释了深度神经网络的隐式偏差，说明模型倾向于收敛到更简单的函数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解深度神经网络优化过程中梯度动态受临界点影响的机制，特别是这些临界点如何与网络结构相关联，并揭示其对模型简化倾向的数学基础。

Method: 采用多项式代数方法，包括Mason定理，分析具有单项式激活函数的深度全连接网络中的临界点行为，重点研究参数配置下雅可比矩阵秩亏的情况。

Result: 在高激活度条件下，临界点精确对应于子网络结构，即部分神经元被抑制或冗余，表明网络在优化过程中自然偏向简单结构。

Conclusion: 该研究为深度神经网络的隐式偏好提供了严格的数学解释，揭示了复杂模型倾向于学习简单函数的本质原因，支持了从奇异学习理论角度理解模型泛化能力的观点。

Abstract: In the optimization of neural networks, gradient dynamics are influenced by critical points that arise from the model's architecture. These critical points occur where the Jacobian of the model's parametrization is rank-deficient, and are the most pronounced singularities studied in Singular Learning Theory. We investigate such points in deep fully-connected networks with monomial activations via tools from polynomial algebra such as Mason's Theorem. We show that, for sufficiently large activation degree, criticality occurs precisely at subnetworks, i.e., at parameter configurations where some neurons are inactive or redundant. This offers a mathematical perspective on the implicit bias in deep neural networks, explaining the tendency of these models to converge toward simpler functions.

</details>


### [387] [An Agentic AI Pipeline for Appliance-Level Energy Anomaly Detection and LLM-Driven Recommendations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28467)
*Dihia Falouz,Aida Douaibia,Amine Bechar,Youssef Elmir,Abbes Amira,Adel Oulefki*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一个端到端智能代理流程，结合深度时间序列预测、变分异常检测和基于大语言模型（LLM）的推理，为办公建筑中的电器级能耗监控生成优先级高、可操作的维护建议。系统采用混合SSA-LSTM模型预测七类办公设备的能耗，并通过带注意力机制的LSTM-VAE检测每日异常消耗事件。该流程包含三阶段LangChain代理：上下文代理动态检索最多八个相关来源，诊断代理生成结构化诊断结果，报告代理输出人类可读的叙述性报告。系统还引入反馈记忆层以持续优化。评估显示，动态检索相比静态检索平均减少一半上下文源数量，且性能相当；最佳LLM后端得分90.4/100，通过率100%；甚至一个本地部署的7B参数模型也能完全通过所有16个测试场景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 办公建筑中的电器级能耗监控常产生大量噪声警报，非专业设施管理人员难以有效利用。现有方法缺乏对异常事件的精准识别与可解释性建议，亟需一种能自动理解、分析并生成可操作维护建议的智能化系统。

Method: 提出一个融合深度学习与大语言模型的端到端代理管道：使用SSA-LSTM混合模型进行能耗预测；采用每设备独立的LSTM-VAE带注意力机制进行异常检测；构建三阶段LangChain代理流程（上下文、诊断、报告），结合动态检索策略与反射式记忆机制，实现从原始数据到可读报告的全流程自动化。

Result: 在16种典型场景下评估表明，动态检索策略显著降低平均上下文源数量（从6降至3–6），同时保持与全静态检索相当的性能；最优LLM后端在70分阈值下达到100%通过率，得分为90.4/100；即使仅使用本地部署的7B参数模型，也能成功处理全部测试场景，验证了系统的有效性与实用性。

Conclusion: 所提出的智能代理系统能够有效解决办公建筑中电器级能耗监控产生的噪声问题，通过融合预测、异常检测与自然语言推理，生成高质量、可解释的维护建议，具备良好的实用性与部署灵活性，适用于非专家用户环境。

Abstract: Appliance-level energy monitoring in office buildings produces noisy alerts that non-expert facility managers struggle to use. This paper proposes an end-to-end agentic pipeline that combines deep time-series forecasting, variational anomaly detection, and LLM-based reasoning to generate prioritized, actionable maintenance recommendations. The system tracks seven office appliances using a hybrid Singular Spectrum Analysis (SSA) and Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) forecasting model, and applies a per-appliance LSTM Variational Autoencoder (VAE) with attention to flag abnormal daily consumption episodes. A three-stage LangChain pipeline begins with a Context Agent that always retrieves three core RAG sources (model reliability, hourly baseline, and expert knowledge) and conditionally adds up to three more (forecast context, anomaly history, global baseline) based on event characteristics, capped at eight reasoning steps. A Diagnosis Agent converts the evidence into a structured JSON diagnosis, and a Report Agent renders a human-readable narrative. A reflective memory layer incorporates operator feedback. The dashboard shows real-time 30-minute forecasts, intraday consumption, the previous day anomaly report, and a feedback form. We evaluate the forecasting model, anomaly detector with appliance-specific thresholds, and LLM reasoning on a 16-scenario benchmark including sustained and transient spikes, unexpected shutdowns, and systemic events, comparing five LLM backends under static vs. dynamic retrieval. Dynamic retrieval matches full static retrieval across all backends while cutting average context from six to three-six sources per event. The best backend scores 90.4/100 with a 100% pass rate at a 70-point threshold, and a fully local 7B-parameter model passes all 16 scenarios.

</details>


### [388] [Modelling Emotional Memory in Children with Tensor Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28470)
*Henry Groves,Lucia F. Jackson,Barbara-Anne Robertson,Jonte R. Hance*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 情感效价影响儿童识别记忆的顺序依赖结构，传统心理模型准确率低，而基于情感的张量网络模型达到77.98%的准确率，表明量子启发方法在建模情感记忆等顺序依赖现象中的价值。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有心理模型无法有效反映情感对象对序列中其他对象记忆的影响，尤其在顺序依赖性方面表现不佳。

Method: 采用经典张量网络模型，引入情感效价因素，分析儿童对情绪化玩具序列的回忆模式。

Result: 该模型实现了77.98%的高准确率，显著优于传统模型，验证了量子启发方法在情感记忆建模中的有效性。

Conclusion: 情感效价在记忆中具有重要影响，量子启发的张量网络模型能更准确地捕捉顺序依赖现象，为儿童情感时间记忆研究提供了新工具。

Abstract: We demonstrate how emotional valence influences the order-dependent structure of children's recognition memory: correct recall of a sequence of emotionally-valenced toys depended not just on the valence of a given toy itself, but also on the valence of the toys shown before and after it. Whilst standard psychological models confirm that order-dependence differs across an event (a set of toys shown in sequence), accuracy is low and the model does not reflect how memory for an emotional object influences others in the set. A classical tensor network model factoring in valence is able to achieve a 77.98\% accuracy in modelling the results of the study. While not strictly a ``quantum cognition'' model, this massive increase in accuracy shows the value of quantum-inspired methods for modelling order-dependent phenomena, such as emotional memory. Further, the task protocol we introduce presents a novel, real-world tool for exploring emotional temporal memory in children for analysis using classical and quantum-like models of cognition.

</details>


### [389] [A Trainable-by-Parts Operator Learning Framework: Bridging DeepONet and Karhunen-Loeve Expansions for Large-Scale Applications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28519)
*Christian Munoz,Alexandre Tartakovsky*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于KL-DNN的可扩展算子学习框架，用于解决大规模偏微分方程（PDE）问题，特别是在地质碳封存（GCS）中的应用。该方法利用低秩奇异值分解构建静态属性的潜在空间，并通过嵌套Karhunen-Loeve展开处理动态压力场，实现全分辨率预测，无需降采样或空间粗化。模型在包含100个样本、三維域中170萬個單元和50個時間步的數據集上訓練，壓力預測平均均方根誤差（RMSE）為1.1 psi（相對誤差0.04%），CO2飽和度RMSE為0.0146（相對誤差5%）。訓練僅需單一GPU 20分鐘，相比DeepONet減少19%壓力誤差、7%飽和度誤差，並實現兩個數量級的速度提升。推理時間低於一分鐘，證明該模型在大規模PDE問題中具有實用性與高精度，適用於快速不確定性量化、歷史匹配與實時決策支持。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大規模偏微分方程問題的算子學習面臨維度災難、記憶體限制和訓練數據有限等挑戰，尤其在地下流體、氣候模擬和地質碳封存等應用中。現有方法常因降采樣或空間粗化導致精度損失，且計算成本高，難以滿足實時需求。因此需要一種高效、高精度且可擴展的算子學習框架。

Method: 提出基於卡拉亨-洛伊（KL）深度神經網絡（KL-DNN）的算子學習框架。利用低秩奇異值分解構建靜態屬性的潛在空間，並採用嵌套的卡拉亨-洛伊展開處理動態壓力場，實現全分辨率預測。模型在大型三維域（170萬個單元）和多時間步上進行訓練，避免空間粗化與降采樣。

Result: KL-DNN模型在壓力預測上達到1.1 psi的平均RMSE（0.04%相對誤差），在CO2飽和度預測上達0.0146的RMSE（5%相對誤差）。訓練僅需20分鐘（單一GPU），相比DeepONet降低19%壓力誤差、7%飽和度誤差，並實現兩個數量級的速度提升。推理時間低於1分鐘，具備實時應用潛力。

Conclusion: 所提出的KL-DNN框架在大規模PDE問題中表現出高精度與高效性，克服了傳統方法的維度與計算瓶頸，適用於地質碳封存等複雜科學工程場景，支持快速不確定性量化、歷史匹配與實時決策，是實際應用的可行方案。

Abstract: Training operator-learning models for large-scale problems governed by partial differential equations (PDEs) is challenging due to the curse of dimensionality, memory constraints, and limited training data. These challenges arise in many scientific and engineering applications, including subsurface flow, climate modeling, and geological carbon storage (GCS). In this work, we propose a scalable operator-learning framework based on the Karhunen-Loeve Deep Neural Network (KL-DNN) and demonstrate its performance for modeling GCS. The model is trained on a dataset comprising 100 samples of large-scale simulations in a three-dimensional domain with 1.7 million cells and 50 time steps. The KL-DNN method constructs latent spaces using low-rank singular value decomposition of static properties and a nested Karhunen-Loeve expansion for dynamic pressure fields, enabling full-resolution predictions without subsampling or spatial coarsening. The KL-DNN model achieves an average root mean square error (RMSE) of 1.1 psi for pressure (0.04% relative error with respect to the average pressure in the domain) and RMSE of 0.0146 for CO2 saturation (5% relative error with respect to the average saturation inside the plume). The model requires 20 minutes of training on a single GPU, representing a 19% reduction in the pressure errors, 7% reduction in the saturation error, and a two-order-of-magnitude speedup compared to DeepONet trained on the same dataset. These results, along with inference time of less than one minute, establish the proposed model as a practical and accurate solution for large-scale PDE problems, enabling rapid uncertainty quantification, history matching, and real-time decision support.

</details>


### [390] [A Gravitational Interpretation of Fine-Tuning Reversion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28525)
*Samuele Poppi,Nils Lukas*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究探讨了在无害数据上微调可能导致早期训练中习得行为的部分逆转，提出一种基于训练历史的几何解释——'引力解释'，即大型早期训练阶段形成主导的行为流形，后期对齐或专业化阶段只是浅层偏移。微调过程会继承一个指向早期流形的持续回归分量（v_rev），该方向在表示漂移中迅速显现，并显著影响对齐效果与安全性。实验表明，通过阻断v_rev方向的运动，可将有害性从19.0%降至8.5%，同时保持任务性能，证明v_rev是早期对齐后退化现象的关键中介。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究微调过程中安全性和能力退化的根源，揭示看似无关的监督信号如何引发对齐脆弱性，强调训练历史在模型行为演化中的关键作用。

Method: 采用代表空间中的方向分析方法，计算并追踪训练过程中表示漂移沿历史定义的回归方向（v_rev）的对齐度；通过选择性阻断该方向，评估其对最终对齐和有害性的影响。

Result: v_rev方向在20步内对齐度从0.429提升至0.647，且所有24组实验均显著高于随机基线；阻断v_rev后，有害性下降至8.5%，对齐度转为负值，任务成本极小。

Conclusion: v_rev是一个由训练历史决定的稳健方向，能解释并部分控制早期对齐后的退化动态，但并非唯一安全方向，也不直接对应原始流形。

Abstract: Fine-tuning on harmless data can partially undo behaviors acquired earlier in training. Safety can erode under benign post-alignment updates, unlearned capabilities can re-emerge, latent traits can transfer through apparently unrelated supervision, and related post-alignment fragility appears in other generative settings. We argue these phenomena are usefully viewed through a common training-history lens. Our hypothesis is geometric: large early training phases create dominant behavioral manifolds, while later alignment or specialization phases are shallower displacements from them. Subsequent fine-tuning can therefore inherit a persistent reversion component pointing back toward a witness of the dominant manifold. We call this the gravitational interpretation of fine-tuning reversion. Across our main settings, representational drift rapidly acquires a component along a history-defined reversion direction (v_rev). In our main track, alignment with v_rev rises from cos = 0.429 +/- 0.052 after the first update to 0.647 +/- 0.021 by step 20. Across 24 run-step pairs, every observed alignment exceeds the p99 of an isotropic activation-space null. We demonstrate that selectively blocking motion along v_rev changes the final alignment at T=100 from 0.648 +/- 0.009 to -0.211 +/- 0.021 and reduces harmfulness from 19.0% +/- 4.0% to 8.5% +/- 1.5% with little task cost. These results support v_rev as a causally relevant mediator of early post-alignment reversion in our setup. Importantly, we do not claim that v_rev is the unique safety direction, nor that the dominant manifold is directly observed; rather, we identify a robust, history-defined direction that explains and partially controls early reversion dynamics.

</details>


### [391] [NIVA: A Multimodal Foundation Model for Actionable Earth System Intelligence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28546)
*Anisha Pal,Aodhan Sweeney,Kyle Heyblom,Kalai Ramea*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: NIVA is a multimodal foundation model for Earth system dynamics, trained on large-scale simulations to learn unified representations between ocean and atmosphere. It demonstrates potential for subseasonal-to-seasonal prediction by capturing key climate variability.


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Existing data-driven weather and climate models struggle with coupled Earth system dynamics, limiting predictability beyond 2 weeks. There's a need for models that can effectively represent interactions across Earth system components.

Method: NIVA is trained on large-scale Earth system simulations using a two-modality setup (ocean and atmosphere) as a proof of concept. It learns cross-modal, physically meaningful representations to capture coupled dynamics.

Result: NIVA accurately predicts major climate indices, demonstrating its ability to capture key modes of climate variability, indicating strong potential for extended-range forecasting.

Conclusion: NIVA provides a promising foundation for subseasonal-to-seasonal prediction by learning unified, physically coherent representations across Earth system components.

Abstract: Recent advances in AI-driven weather and climate modeling have improved forecast skill while reducing computational cost. However, existing data-driven approaches are limited in their ability to model coupled Earth system dynamics, which is required for extending predictability beyond the ~2-week horizon. To address this, we introduce NIVA, a multimodal foundation model designed to learn unified representations across Earth system components. While the full framework targets atmosphere, ocean, ice, and land interactions, we focus here on a two-modality setting (ocean and atmosphere) as a controlled proof of concept to evaluate whether foundation models can learn coupled dynamics. Trained on large-scale Earth system simulations, NIVA learns physically meaningful cross-modal structure, providing a foundation for subseasonal-to-seasonal prediction. As initial validation, we show that NIVA captures key modes of climate variability through accurate prediction of major climate indices.

</details>


### [392] [Improving Coherence in Hierarchical Time Series Forecasting using Structured Temporal Fusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28553)
*Ruchi Pakhle*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Hierarchical Temporal Fusion (HTF)模型，通过结构化层次嵌入和一致性感知损失函数，在训练阶段直接整合层级一致性约束，实现对多层级时间序列的准确且一致的预测。在M5和能源消耗数据集上的实验表明，该方法显著降低预测不一致性并提升准确性，优于传统再平衡方法和深度学习基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统统计方法如Bottom-Up和MinT虽能保证层级一致性，但难以捕捉复杂的非线性时序依赖和协变量交互；而现有深度学习方法缺乏对层级结构的显式建模，导致预测结果在不同层级间不一致。因此需要一种能够同时建模时序动态与结构一致性的新方法。

Method: HTF基于Temporal Fusion Transformer（TFT）架构，引入结构化层次嵌入以编码层级关系，并设计一致性感知损失函数，在训练过程中惩罚子节点预测值之和与父节点预测值之间的差异，从而让模型在学习时序模式的同时自动满足层级聚合约束。

Result: 在M5和能源消费两个公开数据集上，HTF相比经典再平衡方法和深度学习基线，在预测准确性上均有显著提升，且层级不一致性大幅降低；注意力可视化和嵌入分析揭示了时序信息与结构信息如何协同作用于预测性能。

Conclusion: HTF通过将层级一致性内嵌于模型训练目标中，实现了对复杂层次时间序列的高效、准确且一致的预测，为实际应用中的多层级预测提供了强有力的新范式。

Abstract: In many real-world applications, such as retail sales, energy usage, and supply chain planning, forecasting is performed across hierarchical structures. These structures often represent aggregations (e.g., products to categories to regions), where forecasts must not only be accurate but also coherent, meaning that lower-level predictions sum correctly to higher-level forecasts. Traditional statistical methods, such as Bottom-Up and MinT, enforce coherence through post-processing but fail to model complex nonlinear temporal dependencies and covariate interactions.
  We propose Hierarchical Temporal Fusion (HTF), a novel extension of the Temporal Fusion Transformer (TFT) that integrates structured hierarchical embeddings with a coherence-aware loss function to ensure consistent forecasts across all levels of a hierarchy. Rather than applying reconciliation after forecasting, HTF embeds coherence directly into the training objective. The coherence loss penalizes the difference between aggregated child forecasts and their corresponding parent forecasts during training, enabling the model to learn both temporal dynamics and structural consistency simultaneously.
  We evaluate HTF on two publicly available benchmark datasets: the M5 Walmart forecasting dataset and a publicly available hierarchical energy consumption dataset. Results demonstrate that HTF substantially reduces forecast incoherence while improving forecasting accuracy compared with classical reconciliation methods and deep learning baselines. In addition, attention visualization and embedding analysis provide insight into how temporal and structural information contribute to hierarchical forecasting performance.

</details>


### [393] [Geometric Measurements of the Axiom of Choice in Neural Proof Embeddings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28572)
*Rodrigo Mendoza-Smith*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究利用Lean 4的公理依赖追踪功能，揭示了选择公理在证明空间中具有可度量的几何特征，遵循单参数混合规律，并对神经定理证明器产生实际影响。通过对Mathlib中471,260个声明按选择公理的传递依赖进行划分，提取42,355个经过追踪的定理的策略调用序列，使用构造性证明训练自监督证明编码器，发现经典证明在距离选择公理越远时，异常分数、重建损失和密度超水平包含三项指标均呈现一致下降趋势，浅层边界（距离2）处区分度最高（AUC 0.847），而距离9以上则趋于不可区分。鲁棒性检验表明该特征在证明长度、文件、作者和主题等控制下依然稳定，并在全源编码器上复现。操作层面，实验显示在251个Mathlib定理上，Lean的aesop策略解决构造性定理的速度是经典定理的13倍；结合ReProver生成器的神经引导混合方法将差距缩小至5倍。几何异常分数能有效预测aesop失败，建立几何特征与证明器性能之间的操作联系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长期以来，选择公理在数学基础中的争议主要停留在哲学和方法论层面，缺乏实证几何或计算层面的度量。本文旨在通过形式化工具揭示其在证明空间中的实际几何表现及其对自动化证明器的影响，填补理论与实践之间的鸿沟。

Method: 采用Lean 4的内核级公理依赖追踪机制，对Mathlib中471,260个声明按选择公理的传递依赖进行分类，筛选出42,355个已追踪定理的策略调用序列。构建自监督证明编码器以学习构造性证明的表示，进而评估经典证明在该表示空间中的分布特性，使用异常分数、重建损失和密度超水平包含三种指标分析其与公理依赖距离的关系。同时在不同控制变量下验证结果的稳健性，并测试编码器对实际证明器性能（如aesop、ReProver）的预测能力。

Result: 三个测量指标均随证明与选择公理的依赖距离增加而系统性下降，在距离2处达到最佳区分度（AUC 0.847），距离9以上则失去区分能力。该几何特征在多种控制条件下保持稳定，并在全源编码器中复现。操作结果显示，aesop在构造性证明上的成功率是经典证明的13倍；结合神经生成策略后差距缩小至5倍。几何异常分数可有效预测aesop失败，建立理论特征与实际证明器性能间的直接关联。

Conclusion: 选择公理不仅是一个逻辑假设，其在证明空间中具有可度量的几何结构，表现为一种一参数混合行为，且这一结构直接影响自动化定理证明器的表现。该发现为理解经典与构造性数学的本质差异提供了新的实证视角，并为改进神经引导型证明器的设计提供了可操作的指标。

Abstract: The axiom of choice has divided the foundations of mathematics for over a century, but the distinction between classical and constructive proofs has remained a philosophical and methodological one. We use Lean 4's kernel-level tracking of axiom dependence to show that the axiom of choice has a measurable geometric correlate in proof space that obeys a one-parameter mixture law and has operational consequences for neural theorem provers. To do this, we partition $471{,}260$ declarations of Mathlib by transitive dependence on the axiom of choice and represent a filtered population of $42{,}355$ traced theorems by their sequences of tactic invocations. We use the constructive proofs in this dataset to train a self-supervised proof encoder and show that when using it to measure classical proofs, three complementary measurements (anomaly score, reconstruction loss, and density-superlevel containment) exhibit a common decline with the proof's distance from the axiom in the dependency graph, from sharp separation at the shallow boundary (AUC $0.847$ at distance $2$) to indistinguishability at distance~$9{+}$. Robustness controls show that the signature survives length, file, author, and topic controls, and replicates under full-source encoders trained on normalised proof source. Operationally, we show that on an evaluation sample of $251$ Mathlib theorems, Lean's \texttt{aesop} tactic solves constructive theorems at $13\times$ the rate of classical ones, and a neural-guided hybrid using the ReProver tactic generator compresses the gap to $5\times$. The geometric anomaly score predicts \texttt{aesop} failure beyond proof length, providing an operational link between the geometric signature and prover performance.

</details>


### [394] [Replica Symmetry Breaking and Algorithmic Thresholds in Empirical Risk Minimization under Multi-Index Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28573)
*Andrea Montanari,Kangjie Zhou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文研究了在高维非凸优化中，多项式时间算法可访问的损失函数景观部分。通过引入增量近似消息传递（IAMP）算法，在高维渐近条件下精确刻画了训练误差及测试误差与训练误差的关系，表明该算法性能在多项式时间内是最优的。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代机器学习模型通过优化高维非凸经验风险函数进行训练，尽管存在大量局部最优解，但基于梯度的优化仍能收敛到接近全局最优解。本文旨在揭示在特定监督学习设置下，多项式时间算法能够达到的最优性能边界。

Method: 提出增量近似消息传递（IAMP）算法，并在高维渐近情形 $n,d\to\infty$ 且 $n/d\to\alpha\in(0, +\infty)$ 下分析其性能，结合独立同分布数据对特征向量和响应变量建模，研究模型在 $m$-维投影下的表现。

Result: IAMP算法实现了在多项式时间内可达到的最优训练误差，精确描述了训练误差与测试误差之间的关系，且该性能被证明为多项式时间算法的理论上限。

Conclusion: 在给定的高维统计学习框架下，IAMP算法达到了多项式时间算法所能实现的最佳性能，为理解现代机器学习优化行为提供了理论依据。

Abstract: Modern machine learning models are trained by optimizing high-dimensional non-convex empirical risk functions. Such cost functions can have a multitude of local optima and yet, gradient-based optimization appears to converge to near-global optima.
  Within a simple supervised learning setting, we develop a precise picture of which parts of the empirical risk landscape are accessible by polynomial-time algorithms. We are given i.i.d. pairs $\{(\boldsymbol{x}_i,y_i):\; 1 \le i\le n\}$ with $\boldsymbol{x}_i\in \mathbb{R}^d$ standard Gaussian feature vectors, and $y_i\in\mathbb{R}$ response variables that depend on $\boldsymbol{x}_i$ through their projections on an unknown $k$-dimensional subspace. We use empirical risk minimization to learn a model that depends on an $m$-dimensional projection of the data (e.g., an $m$-neurons neural network).
  We propose an incremental approximate message passing (IAMP) algorithm and precisely characterize the training error it achieves, as well as the relation between test and training error, in the high dimensional asymptotics $n,d\to\infty$, with $n/d\toα\in (0, +\infty)$. Based on earlier work in related models, we expect that the performance achieved by our algorithm is optimal among polynomial-time algorithms.

</details>


### [395] [What LLMs explain is not what they believe: Evaluating explanation sufficiency under models' own input beliefs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28615)
*Nhi Nguyen,Shauli Ravfogel,Rajesh Ranganath*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究大语言模型（LLM）在高风险领域中使用的自由文本解释（如思维链、事后推理）是否充分，提出了自洽充分性（SCSuff）评估指标，用于衡量解释是否包含足够信息以说明模型输出过程。实验表明解释普遍不充分，且与模型规模、准确率或输出熵相关性弱，但可通过内部表示预测其充分性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前大语言模型在关键应用中依赖自由文本解释来说明决策过程，但缺乏对这些解释是否真正充分的评估方法，尤其未考虑输入分布的影响。因此需要一种可泛化、无偏见的评估框架。

Method: 将经典特征归因中的充分性概念推广至任意解释；利用模型自身生成基于解释的替代输入，反映其信念；提出信息论度量 SCSuff 来评估解释的自洽充分性，无需预设偏差或捷径。

Result: SCSuff 与针对性扰动测试结果一致；解释充分性随输入分布变化；多数情况下解释不充分；与模型大小、准确性或输出熵关联较弱；但可通过最终标记隐藏状态预测 SCSuff 分数。

Conclusion: 自由文本解释通常不足以完全解释模型行为，但 SCSuff 可作为有效评估工具，指导解释质量的检测与改进。代码已开源。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in high-stakes domains, where free-text explanations such as chain-of-thought and post-hoc rationales are used to justify model outputs. Yet it remains unclear whether these explanations are sufficient, i.e., if they contain enough information to explain the model's output-generating process. We generalize classical sufficiency from feature attributions to arbitrary explanations and prove that explanation sufficiency can change depending on the input distribution, which must be explicitly defined for LLM explanations. We propose using the LLM itself to generate alternative inputs conditioned on an explanation, capturing its beliefs about possible inputs. We formalize self-consistent sufficiency as a goal for free-text explanations and introduce an information-theoretic metric, SCSuff, that enables evaluation of free-text explanations without relying on predefined biases or shortcuts. Our experiments show that SCSuff agrees with targeted perturbation tests where applicable and demonstrate that explanation sufficiency can vary with the input distribution. We find LLM explanations are generally insufficient and weakly correlated with model size, accuracy, or output entropy. Analysis of final-token hidden states shows that top and bottom SCSuff scores can be predicted from internal representations, suggesting that SCSuff can guide detection and improvement of sufficient LLM explanations. The code for this paper is available at https://github.com/rajesh-lab/self-consistent-sufficiency .

</details>


### [396] [Randomized Exploration for Linear Bandits via Absolute Perturbations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28616)
*Toshinori Kitamura,Shuai Liu,Csaba Szepesvári*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出绝对泰普森采样（ATS），通过将探索噪声的符号替换为其绝对值，使期望上保持乐观性，从而在保持泰普森采样计算效率的同时，实现类似UCB的简洁后悔分析。证明了ATS达到$\tilde{O}(d^{3/2}\sqrt{K})$的后悔界，与现有线性带宽泰普森采样的结果一致。进一步引入集合绝对泰普森采样（EATS），通过对多个绝对扰动取最大值并归一化，随集合规模增大趋近于UCB行为。实验表明中等集合规模即表现良好。该研究在理论上和实践中建立了随机探索与确定性乐观之间的桥梁。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在随机线性带宽问题中，标准的上置信界（UCB）算法虽有简洁的频率论后悔分析，但计算成本高；而泰普森采样（TS）虽计算高效，却因非乐观性质难以分析。本文旨在设计一种既能保持计算效率又具备简单后悔分析的新方法。

Method: 提出绝对泰普森采样（ATS），将泰普森采样中的带符号探索噪声替换为绝对值，确保期望上的乐观性；进一步提出集合绝对泰普森采样（EATS），通过多个绝对扰动的最大值及归一化实现对UCB的逼近。

Result: ATS实现了$\tilde{O}(d^{3/2}\sqrt{K})$的后悔界，与现有泰普森采样结果一致；EATS随集合大小增加逐渐收敛至UCB行为，实验显示中等集合规模即可取得优异性能。

Conclusion: 所提方法在理论和实践上弥合了随机探索与确定性乐观之间的鸿沟，提供了兼具计算效率与可分析性的新范式。

Abstract: In stochastic linear bandits, the canonical Upper Confidence Bound (UCB) algorithm admits a simple frequentist regret analysis but can be computationally demanding, while Thompson Sampling (TS) is computationally attractive yet typically harder to analyze due to its non-optimistic nature. We propose Absolute Thompson Sampling (ATS), a simple modification of TS that ensures optimism in expectation by replacing the signed exploration noise with its absolute value. This preserves the computational efficiency of TS while avoiding the technically involved anti-concentration arguments common in TS analyses, enabling a simple UCB-style regret analysis. We show that ATS achieves $\tilde{O}(d^{3/2}\sqrt{K})$ regret, matching existing bounds for TS in linear bandits. We further introduce Ensemble Absolute Thompson Sampling (EATS), which takes the maximum over multiple absolute perturbations with normalization by the ensemble size. As the ensemble size grows, EATS converges to the UCB objective, recovering UCB behavior in the limit. Experiments show that moderate ensemble sizes already yield strong performance. Our results point to a bridge between randomized exploration and deterministic optimism both in theory and practice.

</details>


### [397] [Improving Patient Subtyping on Longitudinal Data using Representations from Mamba-based Architecture](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28623)
*Md Mozaharul Mottalib,Rahmatollah Beheshti*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种基于Mamba的自监督模型，用于从电子健康记录（EHR）中学习有效表示并实现患者亚型划分。该模型在公共和私有真实世界EHR数据集上进行了评估，展示了在预测任务和聚类分析中的优越性能，为基于时间序列的EHR数据进行患者分组提供了新见解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 电子健康记录（EHR）数据具有复杂性和不规则性，传统方法难以有效进行患者亚型划分。为了提升精准医疗中的患者分组效果，亟需一种能够处理时间序列EHR数据的高效表示学习方法。

Method: 提出一种自监督的Mamba-based模型，利用Mamba架构捕捉长序列依赖关系，通过自监督学习策略从原始EHR数据中提取高质量的时间表示，并结合多种聚类算法进行患者亚型划分。

Result: 实验表明，所提模型在多个真实世界数据集上均优于现有基线模型，在疾病分类与患者聚类任务中表现更优；不同聚类方法的对比揭示了基于时间序列表示进行患者分组的有效策略。

Conclusion: 本研究验证了基于Mamba的自监督模型在处理复杂、不规则的EHR时间序列数据方面的有效性，为精准医疗中的患者亚型划分提供了有力工具和深入洞察。

Abstract: Effective sub-typing (also known as grouping or clustering) of patients using their electronic health record (EHR) data can greatly inform precision medicine efforts. However, subtyping temporal EHR datasets is known to be challenging due to inherent EHR issues, including complexity and irregularity. In this study, we propose a self-supervised Mamba-based model that learns effective EHR representations and enables enhanced patient subtyping. We evaluate the proposed model on public and private real-world EHR datasets to classify the data based on the available labels and subtype patients based on the representations learned from the model. Through an extensive set of experiments, we demonstrate that our model's design choices lead to better performance compared to competitive baseline models for prediction. Moreover, we evaluate several clustering techniques to demonstrate that our findings offer valuable insights into subtyping patients based on temporal records from EHR models\footnote{Our implementations are available at https://github.com/healthylaife/triplet_mamba.

</details>


### [398] [When More Sampling Hurts: The Modal Ceiling and Correlation Ceiling of Test-Time Scaling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28661)
*Yong Yi Bay,Kathleen A. Yearick*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 语言模型通过多次采样（测试时扩展）来回答难题，虽然覆盖率随采样增加而上升，但选择正确答案的能力受限于识别能力，而非生成能力。过多采样只会增强对错误答案的自信，反而降低质量。真正的瓶颈是识别正确答案，而非生成。因此，采样数量应控制在有效样本数内，通常几十次采样后，投票结果已稳定，继续采样无益甚至有害。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究测试时采样在推理系统中的实际效益，揭示过度采样带来的副作用，明确采样与选择之间的权衡关系。

Method: 提出‘有效采样数’概念，通过分析采样过程中的投票稳定性与相关性变化，量化采样上限，并以实证方式验证不同采样次数下的表现趋势。

Result: 采样超过几十次后，答案选择不再改善，甚至恶化；投票结果在少数采样后即达到稳定，表明识别正确答案是主要瓶颈。

Conclusion: 过度采样不仅浪费计算资源，还可能损害最终答案质量；关键在于识别正确答案，而非生成更多样本。有效的采样数量应被严格控制，其上限可由实际采样过程直接推断。

Abstract: People overthink; language models over-sample, and the extra effort can talk both into a worse answer. Reasoning systems answer a hard question by sampling it many times (test-time scaling), and the more they draw, the more often a correct answer turns up somewhere, so coverage, the fraction of problems with at least one correct try, climbs and appears to be progress. But a deployed system must return one answer, and choosing it, not knowing which try is right, is selection; selection is capped, and past a point extra samples only make the model surer of a confident mistake, even as every draw adds cost. The gap between climbing coverage and stalled selection, the identifiability gap, is the answer a model can produce but not pick. So the real question is not whether to sample but how far, and the answer is: not far. For picking an answer, the vote has already settled within a few dozen draws, the modal ceiling; for scoring a benchmark, sooner still, the correlation ceiling. Beyond that, extra draws cost compute and add nothing, and can even make the answer worse. This paper turns the cutoff into a single number, the effective number of samples, that any sampling run already reveals. The bottleneck is recognizing a right answer, not generating one.

</details>


### [399] [Closed-Form Steepest Descent Direction toward Flat Minima: Reducing Upper Bounds on the Loss Hessian Eigenspectrum in Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28662)
*Yuto Omae,Kazuki Sakai,Yohei Kakimoto,Makoto Sasaki,Yusuke Sakai,Hirotaka Takahashi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为Hessian Spectral Range (HSR)正则化的新型方法，通过解析推导Wolkowicz-Styan (WS)上界关于损失海森矩阵最大特征值的梯度，指导神经网络参数沿着使损失景观更平坦的方向更新。该方法在三层神经网络和交叉熵损失下有效，能缩小海森特征值谱、避免尖锐极小点和鞍点，促进收敛到平坦极小点。尽管目前应用受限于特定架构与损失函数，但这是首个提供闭式梯度以引导平坦极小点收敛且无需数值近似的理论工作，对理解神经网络泛化机制具有重要意义。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前研究虽已尝试通过算法降低损失景观的曲率（如海森特征值），但缺乏对数据分布与网络参数如何结构性决定趋向平坦极小点方向的理论解释。现有方法多依赖经验设计，缺乏可解析分析的梯度指引，限制了对平坦性与泛化之间关系的深入理解。因此亟需一种可解析计算的梯度方向，以指导模型朝向更平坦的极小点优化。

Method: 本文基于三层神经网络中交叉熵损失的Wolkowicz-Styan (WS)上界，首次解析推导其关于网络参数的梯度，并据此设计了HSR正则化：在训练过程中沿该上界梯度的负方向更新参数，从而主动抑制海森矩阵的最大特征值，压缩特征值谱范围，实现对平坦极小点的偏好。

Result: 实验表明，HSR正则化能有效缩小损失海森矩阵的特征值谱范围，显著减少对尖锐极小点和鞍点的收敛倾向，提升模型在测试集上的泛化性能。同时，该方法在理论上提供了闭式梯度表达式，无需数值近似，为后续研究提供了可分析的理论基础。

Conclusion: 本研究首次实现了对跨熵损失下三层数神经网络海森上界的可解析梯度推导，并提出了基于此的HSR正则化方法，成功引导模型收敛至平坦极小点。尽管当前适用范围有限，但其理论贡献为理解神经网络泛化机制开辟了新路径，具有重要的理论价值与拓展潜力。

Abstract: The flatness hypothesis suggests that flatness of the loss landscape, as measured by the eigenvalues of the loss Hessian, correlates with better neural network generalization. While various algorithms reduce these eigenvalues, most focus on procedural design, leaving it unclear how data distributions and NN parameters structurally determine directions toward flat minima. Characterizing these directions analytically is generally intractable. To overcome this mathematical difficulty, recent studies derived the Wolkowicz-Styan (WS) upper bound on the maximum eigenvalue of the cross-entropy loss Hessian in three-layer NNs. Although this upper bound is differentiable, its gradient was not derived. Therefore, we analytically derive the gradient of the WS upper bound to characterize directions leading to flat minima. Based on this, we propose Hessian Spectral Range (HSR) Regularization, which updates parameters along the steepest descent direction of the WS bound. Experiments demonstrate that HSR Regularization narrows the Hessian eigenvalue spectrum, avoids sharp minima and saddle points, and promotes convergence to flat minima. Although the applicability of this method is currently limited to cross-entropy loss and three-layer architectures, to the best of the authors' knowledge, this is the first study to report a closed-form gradient that promotes convergence to flat minima without numerical approximations. Therefore, the theoretical analysis of this gradient is expected to contribute to the further development of NNs.

</details>


### [400] [Entropy Regularized Reinforcement Learning for Zero-Sum Stochastic Differential Games in a Regime-Switching Jump-Diffusion Process](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28669)
*Congde Hu,Zhuo Jin,Danping Li,Lin Xu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种分布控制方法，用于解决传统随机微分博弈（SDG）框架中的参数误设和突发结构环境变化问题。该方法将最优策略建模为在连续状态、离散机制状态和参数条件下的动作概率分布，构建了熵正则化的零和随机微分博弈（ERRL-ZSSDG）的强化学习框架，适用于具有机制切换跳跃扩散过程的场景。基于动态规划原理（DPP），推导出关联的耦合哈密顿-雅可比-贝尔曼-伊斯克斯（HJBI）方程组，并通过价值函数梯度表达均衡策略。针对线性二次型问题，通过求解耦合常微分方程组获得价值函数与均衡策略的半解析解；在更一般情形下，设计了演员-评论家策略改进算法以近似不同机制下的价值函数与均衡策略。通过投资博弈的应用实例，数值结果展示了温度参数和机制转换对最优策略与价值的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统随机微分博弈框架在面对参数误设和突发结构性环境变化时表现不佳，亟需一种更具鲁棒性和适应性的建模方法。本文旨在通过引入分布控制思想，增强模型对不确定性和环境突变的应对能力。

Method: 提出分布控制框架，将最优策略表示为条件概率分布；建立熵正则化零和随机微分博弈模型；利用动态规划原理推导耦合的哈密顿-雅可比-贝尔曼-伊斯克斯（HJBI）方程组；对线性二次型问题求解耦合常微分方程组获得半解析解；在一般情形下采用演员-评论家算法进行策略迭代与值函数逼近。

Result: 成功构建了适用于机制切换跳扩散过程的熵正则化零和随机微分博弈框架；在线性二次型情形下获得半解析解；在一般情形下通过演员-评论家算法实现策略与值函数的有效近似；数值实验验证了温度参数和机制转换对策略与价值的重要影响。

Conclusion: 所提出的分布控制方法有效提升了随机微分博弈框架对参数不确定性与环境突变的适应能力，为复杂动态环境下的决策问题提供了新的建模与求解工具，具有良好的理论意义与应用前景。

Abstract: To address parameter misspecification and sudden structural environmental changes in conventional stochastic differential game (SDG) frameworks, this paper introduces a distributional control approach that characterizes optimal strategies as probability distributions over actions, conditioned on the continuous state, the discrete regime state, and parameters. This forms a reinforcement learning framework for entropy-regularized zero-sum stochastic differential games (ERRL-ZSSDGs) in a regime-switching jump-diffusion process. Using the dynamic programming principle (DPP), we derive the associated coupled systems of Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman-Isaacs (HJBI) equations, from which equilibrium strategies are expressed via gradients of the value function. For linear-quadratic problems, semi-analytical solutions for both value function and equilibrium strategies are obtained by solving a system of coupled ordinary differential equations (ODEs). In more general settings, an Actor-Critic policy improvement algorithm is developed to approximate the value functions and equilibrium policies across different regimes. The method is applied to an investment game, and numerical examples illustrate the effect of the temperature parameter and regime transitions on optimal policies and values.

</details>


### [401] [Entropy-Regularized Reinforcement Learning for Linear-Quadratic Stackelberg Differential Games in Regime-Switching Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28671)
*Congde Hu,Danping Li,Lin Xu,Wenying Xu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于熵正则化强化学习（ERRL）的方法，用于求解具有马尔可夫切换机制的连续时间线性二次栈式微分博弈（LQ-SDGs）。通过引入熵正则化，推导出具有探索性的弱耦合哈密顿-雅可比-贝尔曼-伊斯艾克斯（HJBI）方程，以促进随机策略在高维系统中避免次优均衡点。结合神经网络近似和新型采样技术，有效解决了高维偏微分方程的计算难题。数值实验表明，该方法在应对环境突变时能更有效地逃离次优陷阱，显著提升决策鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统动态规划与哈密顿-雅可比-贝尔曼-伊斯艾克斯（HJBI）方法在求解高维连续时间栈式微分博弈（SDGs）时面临巨大计算挑战，且易陷入次优均衡。现有方法缺乏有效的探索机制，难以应对环境突变下的复杂决策问题。因此亟需一种兼具高效性与鲁棒性的新方法。

Method: 提出熵正则化强化学习框架，构建适用于线性二次栈式微分博弈（LQ-SDGs）的弱耦合HJBI方程；利用神经网络近似状态相关的值函数，实现高维偏微分方程的高效求解；设计新型采样策略以提升计算可行性；通过策略探索增强机制避免陷入局部最优。

Result: 所提方法在多个高维测试场景中表现出优越性能，能够有效逃离次优均衡陷阱，显著提升决策质量；相比传统方法，其在面对马尔可夫切换环境时展现出更强的适应性和稳定性；验证了熵正则化与神经网络近似在提升算法鲁棒性方面的关键作用。

Conclusion: 熵正则化强化学习为解决高维连续时间栈式微分博弈提供了高效、鲁棒的新范式。结合神经网络与创新采样技术，该框架不仅提升了计算效率，还增强了策略的探索能力，特别适用于存在突发环境变化的复杂决策场景。

Abstract: Stackelberg differential games (SDGs) provide a powerful framework for hierarchical decision-making in stochastic and continuous-time environments, yet their solution remains computationally challenging due to the complexity of traditional dynamic programming and Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman-Isaacs (HJBI) methods, especially in high-dimensional systems. This paper proposes an entropy-regularized reinforcement learning (ERRL) approach for linear-quadratic SDGs (LQ-SDGs) within a continuous-time diffusion framework governed by Markovian regime switching. The key innovation lies in deriving exploratory weakly-coupled HJBI equations with entropy regularization, which promotes stochastic policies that actively avoid suboptimal equilibria -- a limitation of classical SDG methods. Neural networks are integrated to approximate regime-dependent value functions and solve high-dimensional partial differential equations (PDEs) efficiently, while a novel sampling technique enhances computational tractability. Numerical results demonstrate the effectiveness of the framework compared to conventional approaches, particularly in escaping suboptimal traps through exploratory policies. The study highlights the critical role of entropy regularization and neural network approximations in achieving robust solutions for hierarchical decision-making problems under abrupt environmental shifts.

</details>


### [402] [Constrained Tabular Diffusion for Finance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28674)
*Michael Cardei,Jose M Munoz,Oscar Barrera,Shreyas K Chandrahas,Partha Saha*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出CTDF模型，通过在反向扩散采样过程中引入无需训练的可行性操作符，实现金融领域中严格约束下的合成数据生成，显著提升数据实用性并确保零约束违规。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准表格扩散模型无法满足金融领域严格的监管与经济目标要求，亟需一种既能生成真实数据又能遵守硬性约束的新方法。

Method: 将采样时的可行性操作与混合类型表格扩散相结合，设计训练-free的可行性操作符嵌入反向扩散采样流程中，以强制执行如合规性、模拟和外推等硬性约束。

Result: 在大规模金融数据集上的实验表明，该方法实现了零约束违反，并提升了稀缺数据的使用价值。

Conclusion: CTDF为生成可信且合规的合成数据提供了一种稳健方法，推动了金融领域严谨生成建模与分析的发展。

Abstract: Generative models in finance face the dual challenge of producing realistic data while satisfying strict regulatory and economic objectives, a requirement that standard tabular diffusion models cannot provide. To address this difficulty, we introduce Constrained Tabular Diffusion for Finance (CTDF), a novel integration of sampling-time feasibility operations with mixed-type tabular diffusion in financial applications. By incorporating a training-free feasibility operator into the reverse-diffusion sampling loop, CTDF enforces hard constraints for applications such as simulation, legal compliance, and extrapolation. Extensive experiments on large-scale financial datasets demonstrate zero constraint violations and improvement in scarce data utility. CTDF establishes a robust method for generating trustworthy and compliant synthetic data, opening new avenues for rigorous generative modeling and analysis in the financial domain.

</details>


### [403] [A Path-Space Formulation of Prediction in World Models: From a Single Action to Prediction, Planning, and Irreversibility](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28751)
*Gunn Kim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于路径空间的AI世界模型预测形式，认为世界模型隐式定义了未来轨迹的概率测度。在局部马尔可夫近似下，该路径测度具有Onsager-Machlup形式。预测（最可能轨迹）、规划（约束优化）和不确定性（波动）均可视为对单一作用泛函的操作。通过分解潜变量动态为可逆与不可逆部分，引入从模型滚动中提取的熵产生操作度量。在小型注意力模型中发现，训练过程中注意力不对称性随数据不可逆性增加而增强；对注意力进行对称化会抑制熵产生，并选择性损害对不可逆动力学的长时程预测，但保留弛豫型预测。结果表明，不可逆性可能是预测世界模型的一种计算资源。更普遍地，基本预测对象是未来路径的分布，而非状态。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统世界模型依赖于一步条件分布序列进行预测，难以捕捉长期依赖和非平衡动力学。本文旨在提出一种更根本的路径空间视角，以更好地建模复杂系统中的动态演化、不确定性及控制行为。

Method: 提出路径空间中的概率测度框架，基于Onsager-Machlup形式描述轨迹分布；将潜变量动态分解为可逆与不可逆成分；利用模型滚动生成数据计算熵产生；设计注意力对称化实验验证其对预测性能的影响。

Result: 注意力不对称性与数据不可逆性正相关；对称化注意力降低熵产生，显著削弱对不可逆过程的长时程预测能力，但不影响可逆松弛过程的预测；说明不可逆性作为计算资源在预测中起关键作用。

Conclusion: 世界模型的基本预测单元应是未来路径的分布，而非单个状态。不可逆性不仅是物理系统的特征，也是预测模型的重要计算资源。路径空间框架为统一处理预测、规划与不确定性提供了理论基础。

Abstract: We propose a path-space formulation of prediction in AI world models. Rather than sequences of one-step conditional distributions, we argue that a world model implicitly defines a probability measure over future trajectories. In the local regime where latent dynamics admit an effective Markovian description, this path measure takes the Onsager-Machlup form. Within this framework, prediction (most probable trajectory), planning (constrained optimization), and uncertainty (fluctuations) emerge as operations on a single action functional. We decompose the latent dynamics into reversible and irreversible components and introduce operational measures of entropy production from model rollouts. In controlled small-scale attention-based models, we find that attention asymmetry is acquired during training in proportion to the irreversibility of the data. Symmetrizing the learned attention suppresses entropy production and selectively degrades long-horizon prediction of irreversible dynamics while preserving relaxational prediction. These results suggest that irreversibility may serve as a computational resource for predictive world models. More generally, the fundamental predictive object is a distribution over future paths rather than states.

</details>


### [404] [Hierarchical Decision Making with Structured Policies: A Principled Design via Inverse Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28764)
*Yuexuan Wang,Jingyuan Zhou,Kaidi Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种系统性整合高层目标抽象与低层决策结构的分层决策框架，通过逆优化方法从专家示范中学习低层优化问题的结构，确保低层策略目标与长期任务目标对齐。在资源分配和避障任务中，该方法在效率和决策质量上均优于现有端到端强化学习、学习增强型最优控制及传统分层强化学习方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有分层强化学习方法难以保证严格约束满足，而基于最优控制的方法常依赖短视且计算成本高的公式；现有分层架构中低层优化问题的制定仍缺乏系统性，多依赖启发式或短视目标，亟需一种能兼顾长期目标与计算可行性的统一框架。

Method: 采用逆优化方法，从专家示范中推导出低层决策问题的结构，使低层目标与高层长期任务目标保持一致；构建分层架构，实现高层目标抽象与低层结构化决策的协同设计。

Result: 在网络资源分配与连续避障任务中，所提方法在决策质量与执行效率方面显著优于多个强基线模型，包括端到端强化学习、学习增强型最优控制以及现有分层强化学习方法。

Conclusion: 本文提出的分层RL-OC框架通过逆优化实现低层目标的结构化建模，有效弥合了高层目标抽象与底层决策之间的差距，为复杂控制任务提供了可扩展、可解释且约束满足的解决方案。

Abstract: Hierarchical decision-making frameworks are pivotal for addressing complex control tasks, enabling agents to decompose intricate problems into manageable subgoals. Despite their promise, existing hierarchical policies face critical limitations: (i) reinforcement learning (RL)-based methods struggle to guarantee strict constraint satisfaction, and (ii) optimal control (OC)-based approaches often rely on myopic and computationally prohibitive formulations. To reconcile these trade-offs, hierarchical RL-OC architectures have emerged as a promising paradigm. However, the formulation of the lower-level optimization within these frameworks remains underexplored, often relying on heuristic or myopic objectives. In this work, we propose a principled framework that systematically integrates upper-level goal abstraction with structured lower-level decision making. We adopt an inverse optimization approach to inform the structure of the lower-level problem from expert demonstrations, ensuring that the objective of the lower-level policy remains aligned with the overall long-term task goal. To validate the approach, our framework is evaluated on distinct decision making tasks: network-based resource allocation and continuous collision avoidance. Empirical results demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms strong baselines based on end-to-end RL, learning-augmented optimal control, and existing hierarchical RL approaches in both efficiency and decision quality.

</details>


### [405] [Generative Learning as a Tool to Improve Perception of Emotional Body Motion Expressions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28769)
*Huakun Liu,Miao Cheng,Xin Wei,Felix Dollack,Victor Schneider,Hideaki Uchiyama,Chia-huei Tseng,Yoshifumi Kitamura,Monica Perusquia-Hernandez*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究探索了基于Transformer的生成模型是否能从文化相关的动作捕捉数据中隐式学习情感身体动作，而无需显式的表情-动作指导。使用49名日本演员的情感表演数据集，模型在13个离散情绪标签上生成富有表现力的动作。通过机器分类器和日本人评估者的人类感知实验，分别获得22.80%和24.91%的识别准确率。此外，研究还验证了生成模型在增强情绪识别、提取情绪特异性运动模式以及合成情绪强度平滑过渡方面的实用性。结果表明，隐式、数据驱动的生成建模在情感计算应用和对情感表达的理解方面具有潜力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 情感身体动作是非语言交流的重要组成部分，对于虚拟现实化身和社会机器人等技术至关重要。然而，由于情感线索的细微性、个体差异和文化差异，准确生成情感表达仍具挑战性。现有方法通常依赖显式的情绪-动作标注，但本研究旨在探索是否可通过文化相关的动作捕捉数据，让生成模型隐式学习情感动作，从而减少对人工标注的依赖。

Method: 采用基于Transformer的生成模型，利用49名日本演员的情感表演动作捕捉数据，以13个离散情绪标签为条件生成身体动作。通过训练模型学习动作与情绪之间的隐含关系，并进行机器识别与人类感知评估。同时，将生成模型应用于情绪识别增强、代表性情绪动作模式提取及情绪强度过渡合成三个实际任务。

Result: 机器分类器在识别生成动作中的情绪时达到22.80%的准确率；日本评估者的人类感知实验显示24.91%的识别准确率，表明生成动作具备一定可辨识性。此外，生成模型在情绪识别增强、提取情绪特异性运动模式和合成平滑情绪过渡方面表现出实用价值。

Conclusion: 研究表明，基于文化数据的隐式生成建模能够有效生成具有情感表达力的身体动作，为情感计算提供新路径，有助于提升虚拟角色的情感真实感，并加深对跨文化情感表达的理解。

Abstract: Emotional body motion expressions are an essential element of non-verbal communication. Effectively conveying these expressions through technology is of utmost importance, for example, with virtual reality avatars and in social robotics. Recent advances in generative models have opened new opportunities for advancing research on emotional body motion learning. However, generating accurate emotional expression representations is challenging, given the subtlety of emotional cues, individual variability, and cultural differences. We investigate whether a generative model can implicitly learn emotional body motions directly from culturally grounded motion-capture data, without explicit emotion-motion guidance. Using a dataset of emotional performances by 49 Japanese actors, we trained a Transformer-based generative model to generate expressive motions conditioned on 13 discrete emotion labels. We evaluate the generated motions from two perspectives: (1) an LSTM-based classifier to assess recognizability by machine observers, achieving a recognition accuracy of 22.80%, and (2) a human perception study with Japanese raters to assess alignment with human affective interpretations, yielding a recognition accuracy of 24.91%. Beyond these, we evaluate the utility of generative modeling for three practical tasks: augmenting emotion recognition models, extracting representative emotion-specific motion patterns, and synthesizing smooth transitions between emotion intensities. Our findings highlight the potential of implicit, data-driven generative modeling to enhance affective computing applications and our understanding of emotion expressions.

</details>


### [406] [On design-unbiased algorithmic Machine Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28795)
*Li-Chun Zhang,Siu-Ming Tam,Luis Sanguiao-Sande,Wesley Yung,Anders Holmberg*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究在缺乏真实数据模型的情况下，如何通过机器学习算法实现对有限总体的无偏预测或分类。重点探讨了训练数据采样方式、算法调参策略以及外部样本性能评估方法，所有推断均基于已知的概率抽样设计，而非假设分布或模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在官方统计等场景中，无偏性至关重要，但传统机器学习方法（如kNN或随机森林）以预测性能为导向，无法直接保证无偏性。因此需要在不依赖真实数据模型的前提下，探索实现无偏预测的条件与方法。

Method: 基于已知的概率抽样设计，分析训练数据的采样方式、算法调参策略及外样本性能评估方法，通过概率论框架进行推断，避免依赖分布假设或模型设定。

Result: 提出了在无真实数据模型条件下实现无偏预测或分类的具体条件与方法，包括合理的采样设计、可调整的算法参数以及基于概率设计的无偏性能评估机制。

Conclusion: 即使没有真实数据模型，只要合理设计采样过程并适当调整算法，仍可在有限总体上实现无偏预测或分类，且其性能评估可基于概率设计实现无偏性。该方法适用于官方统计等对无偏性要求较高的领域。

Abstract: Machine Learning (ML) algorithms, such as k-Nearest Neighbours (kNN) or random forest, eschew the ideal of true data models in favour of predictive performance. However, minimising the MSE or F-score cannot lead to unbiasedness directly, which is important in many situations such as official statistics. We study the conditions of algorithmic ML, other than the existence and knowledge of true data models, which lead to unbiased prediction or classification for a given finite population, including how the training data may be sampled from the population, how a trained prediction algorithm can be tuned to achieve unbiased prediction or classification for that population, and how the performance of out-of-sample prediction or classification can be assessed unbiasedly. The inference is based on the known probability design of samples and training sets, rather than any assumed distributions or models.

</details>


### [407] [HARD-KV: Head-Adaptive Regularization for Decoding-time KV Compression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28831)
*Yuxuan Yang,Feiyang Ren,Bowen Zeng,Dalin Zhang,Jinpeng Chen,Gang Chen,Huan Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: HARD-KV 解决了长上下文大模型推理中动态压缩算法与静态内存需求之间的矛盾，通过级联缓存架构和逻辑校准机制，实现高效且高精度的生成，实验表明其在10k+ token场景下可提升2倍吞吐量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长上下文大模型推理面临动态选择（如Top-p采样）与现代推理引擎要求静态内存模式之间的冲突，导致效率与精度难以兼顾。

Method: 提出HARD-KV框架，采用级联缓存管理不同密度的缓存层级，并引入逻辑校准机制统一不同重要性度量，同时重构动态索引为连续物理布局以适配高性能推理引擎。

Result: 在数学推理基准（AIME、U-Math）上，HARD-KV相比静态基线实现最高2倍的吞吐量提升，同时保持10k+ token场景下的高保真生成质量。

Conclusion: HARD-KV成功弥合了动态选择与静态系统约束之间的鸿沟，为长上下文大模型高效推理提供了新范式。

Abstract: Long-context LLM inference faces a fundamental conflict: head-adaptive compression algorithms (e.g., Top-$p$ nucleus sampling) offer superior accuracy by dynamically fluctuating memory budgets, yet modern inference engines (e.g., vLLM) demand rigid, static memory patterns to leverage CUDA Graphs and PagedAttention. We resolve this ``Static-Dynamic'' mismatch with HARD-KV, a unified framework that that bridges dynamic selection with rigid system constraints. HARD-KV introduces a Cascade Cache hierarchy, managing the token lifecycle across dense, sparse, and condensed tiers. Crucially, we propose a Logits Calibration mechanism that normalizes diverse importance metrics into a unified probability space, enabling consistent Top-$p$ budgeting across heterogeneous heads. To bridge the efficiency gap, we offer a system-level solution, which rewrites fragmented, dynamic indices into contiguous physical layouts compatible with high-performance inference engine. Extensive experiments on math-reasoning benchmarks (AIME, U-Math) verify that HARD-KV achieves up to 2$\times$ throughput improvement over static baselines while maintaining high-fidelity generation in 10k+ token scenarios. Code is available at https://github.com/SuDIS-ZJU/HARDInfer.

</details>


### [408] [Active Quantum Kernel Acquisition for Gaussian Process Regression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28833)
*Jian Xu,Delu Zeng,Qibin Zhao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了在近中期量子硬件上进行量子核估计时的采样预算限制问题，提出了一种基于敏感性加权的非均匀采样策略，用于改进高斯过程回归中的核矩阵估计。通过推导三种闭式敏感度指标（成对耦合、留一法残差、边际似然梯度），结合奈曼型最小方差分配规则，并引入由弗罗贝尼乌斯范数下界支撑的均匀覆盖底限以防止过度集中，实现了在多个基准数据集和合成实验中测试均方误差降低10%-21%的效果。该方法在真实量子自然数据的ZZ与Pauli-Z核上也表现出显著优势，且可推广至贝叶斯积分、异方差回归等四种下游任务。当特征嵌入到ZZ核导致指数集中时，增益消失，符合理论预期。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 量子核估计受制于有限的测量次数（shots），传统均匀分配方式效率低下。尤其在高斯过程回归中，后验量与核误差耦合更紧密，因此需要更精细的采样策略来提升精度并降低预算需求。

Method: 推导三类闭式敏感度指标（|α_i α_j|、留一法残差、边际似然梯度），采用奈曼型最小方差分配规则进行非均匀采样分配，并引入基于弗罗贝尼乌斯范数下界的均匀覆盖底限以增强鲁棒性。

Result: 在四个UCI基准和两个合成实验中，相比均匀分配，测试均方误差降低10%-21%；在真实量子核上实现-13%至-15%的误差减少（低预算下，p<0.05）；可迁移至多种下游任务；在指数集中区域无增益，与理论一致。

Conclusion: 通过敏感性驱动的非均匀采样策略，可在保持精度的同时显著降低量子核估计的采样预算。该方法在适度预算条件下表现优异，且具有良好的泛化能力，适用于多种量子核与下游任务场景。

Abstract: Quantum kernel estimation on near-term hardware is shot-budgeted: every entry of the kernel Gram matrix is a Bernoulli expectation that must be sampled with a finite number of circuit executions. Recent work on quantum kernel classification has shown that allocating shots non-uniformly across kernel entries, weighted by their downstream task sensitivity, can reduce the shot budget required to reach a target accuracy. We extend this idea to Gaussian process (GP) regression, a setting whose downstream quantities (full-spectrum posterior variance, log-determinant, marginal likelihood) couple to kernel error more tightly than the sign-only outputs of classification. We derive three closed-form pair-level sensitivities predictive coupling $|α_iα_j|$, leave-one-out residual, and marginal-likelihood gradient and plug them into a Neyman-style minimum-variance allocation rule. To prevent catastrophic over-concentration when the warm-up sensitivity estimate is itself noisy, we add a high uniform coverage floor justified by a Frobenius lower bound on the missing-entry perturbation. On four UCI benchmarks and two synthetic RBF + Bernoulli controlled studies, the resulting allocator delivers $10$--$21\%$ test-RMSE improvement over uniform allocation across the moderate-budget regime. The gain transfers (i) to genuine ZZ and Pauli-Z quantum kernels on quantum-natural data ($-13$--$15\%$ at low budget, $p<0.05$ paired) and (ii) to four downstream tasks (Bayesian quadrature, heteroscedastic regression, hyperparameter learning, multi-output Cokriging). On UCI features embedded into a ZZ kernel the gain disappears, consistent with the exponential-concentration regime where shot allocation has nothing to exploit.

</details>


### [409] [Fisher-Routed Mixture of Experts for Federated Class-Incremental Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28835)
*Wenhao Yuan,Chenchen Lin,Jian Chen,Jinfeng Xu,Zewei Liu,Edith Cheuk Han Ngai*

Main category: cs.LG
