At evaluation, we edit the internal representation of one written state while leaving the visible scratchpad text fixed. Because the transition rule is known, the edit has a single correct downstream consequence. In Qwen2.5-Coder-7B, the state-writing model predicts the next phase bit implied by the edited state on 80% and 91% of held-out examples across the two task variants, while pretrained and final-answer-only controls remain near baseline. Additional controls rule out generic next-token steering and copying another continuation: the prediction depends on both the edited state and the current move. The same causal-use pattern replicates across model families. Together, these results suggest a sharper goal for scratchpad oversight: not just to make intermediate reasoning legible, but to train written states that the model uses as part of its computation.

</details>


### [476] [The Mirage of Optimizing Training Policies: Monotonic Inference Policies as the Real Objective for LLM Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29526)
*Jing Liang,Hongyao Tang,Yi Ma,Yancheng He,Weixun Wang,Xiaoyang Li,Ju Huang,Wenbo Su,Jinyi Liu,Yan Zheng,Jianye Hao,Bo Zheng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对大语言模型（LLM）强化学习（RL）训练中存在的训练-推理不匹配问题，提出了一种新的优化目标MIPI和两步式框架MIPU，通过引入采样参考候选更新并使用推理端间隙代理选择同步候选，有效缓解了因策略更新与部署策略不一致导致的性能下降问题。实验表明，MIPU在高不匹配场景下显著提升了推理性能和训练稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法虽致力于缓解训练-推理不匹配带来的离策略问题，但忽略了目标错位：训练端的有效策略更新未必能提升实际部署时使用的推理策略性能。这一目标错位导致训练优化无法真正反映部署表现，影响模型实用性与稳定性。

Method: 提出Monotonic Inference Policy Improvement (MIPI)目标，设计Monotonic Inference Policy Update (MIPU)框架，包含两步：1）构建基于采样器的候选更新；2）利用推理侧间隙代理筛选并同步接受更新，确保策略改进在推理端可验证且单调提升。

Result: 在两种不同规模模型、高训练-推理不匹配条件下，MIPU显著提升平均推理性能，并增强训练过程的稳定性，证明其在真实部署场景下的有效性。

Conclusion: 训练-推理不匹配中的目标错位是影响LLM RL稳定性的关键因素。通过引入以推理性能为导向的优化机制，MIPU实现了对部署策略的可靠提升，为高阶语言模型后训练提供了更稳健的强化学习范式。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has gained growing attention in large language model (LLM) post-training, yet RL training remains fragile and can suffer from instability or collapse. One vital cause is training-inference mismatch: LLM adopts separate inference and training engines for generation efficiency and training precision, which in practice exhibits inconsistent probabilities for the same trajectories on training and inference sides, even with synchronized model parameters. This naturally induces a special type of off-policyness ever existing and poisoning the training. Prior works have made various efforts in addressing the off-policyness to stabilize the training policies under the mismatch. In this paper, we point out the objective misalignment neglected by existing works that an effective update to the policy in the training engine not necessarily ensures the improvement of the inference policy, i.e., the one used in deployment. To this end, we propose a new policy optimization objective for LLM RL, named Monotonic Inference Policy Improvement (MIPI). Following this principle, we introduce Monotonic Inference Policy Update (MIPU), a two-step LLM RL framework that constructs sampler-referenced candidate updates and selectively accepts synchronized candidates using an inference-side gap proxy. Experiments conducted on two model scales under high mismatch show that MIPU improves average reasoning performance and training stability.

</details>


### [477] [VISTA-DZ: Visual Semantic Trajectory Adaptation for Personalized Dilemma Zone Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29548)
*Chuheng Wei,Ziye Qin,Ziran Wang,Guoyuan Wu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出VISTA-DZ，一种基于语义画像的个性化停车-通行决策与决策时间预测框架。通过将历史轨迹转换为视觉表示，利用视觉语言模型生成行为画像，并以语义嵌入条件化双输出预测网络，结合双向GRU编码器、司机条件化的多头交叉注意力和特征式线性调制，实现对驾驶员行为的精准建模。在SDZ和新收集的FDZ数据集上的实验表明，该模型在域内仿真中达到93.26%准确率，在20个保留驾驶员上的平均准确率达90.22%；跨域实验显示其具备可行的零样本仿真到现实迁移能力，且结合少量实地数据后表现出更优的真实世界泛化性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 驾驶者在信号灯黄灯阶段的犹豫区决策（停/行）是交通安全关键问题。现有个性化模型依赖人工设计的标量描述符，难以充分捕捉个体差异（如风险偏好、制动习惯、决策阈值），导致预测精度受限。因此亟需更全面、自动化的个性化建模方法以支持自适应信号控制、高级驾驶辅助系统及以人为本的智能交通应用。

Method: 将历史轨迹转化为视觉表示，由视觉语言模型生成行为画像并生成语义嵌入，作为条件输入至双输出预测网络；采用双向GRU编码器提取时序证据，结合司机条件化的多头交叉注意力机制进行特征选择，使用特征式线性调制（FiLM）实现特征自适应，最终完成停/行决策与决策时间的联合预测。

Result: 在SDZ和新构建的FDZ数据集上，VISTA-DZ显著优于仅依赖轨迹或人工特征的基线模型；在域内仿真中达到93.26%的准确率，20名未见驾驶员的平均准确率为90.22%；跨域实验表明其具备良好的零样本仿真到真实迁移能力，且融合少量真实数据后可进一步提升实际场景泛化性能。

Conclusion: VISTA-DZ通过引入视觉语言模型生成的语义画像，实现了对驾驶员个体差异的高效表征与建模，显著提升了犹豫区行为预测的准确性与泛化能力，为智能交通系统中的人因驱动决策提供了强有力的技术支持。

Abstract: Driver decision making in the dilemma zone at signalized intersections is safety critical, as vehicles approaching a yellow signal must decide whether to stop or proceed within limited time and distance margins. Accurate prediction of both stop-go decisions and decision timing is important for adaptive signal control, advanced driver assistance systems, and human-centered intelligent transportation applications. However, dilemma zone behavior is strongly driver dependent. Similar approach trajectories may lead to different decisions across drivers because of differences in risk preference, braking habit, and decision threshold. Existing personalized models often rely on handcrafted scalar descriptors, which provide useful but limited summaries of individual behavior. This paper proposes VISTA-DZ, a semantic-profile-conditioned framework for personalized stop-go and decision-time prediction. Historical trajectories are converted into visual representations, interpreted by a vision-language model to generate behavioral profiles, and encoded as semantic embeddings to condition a dual-output prediction network. The final model combines a bidirectional GRU encoder, driver-conditioned multi-head cross-attention, and Feature-wise Linear Modulation for temporal evidence selection and feature adaptation. Experiments on the SDZ dataset and a newly collected FDZ dataset show that VISTA-DZ outperforms trajectory-only and handcrafted personalization baselines, achieving 93.26% in-domain simulation accuracy and 90.22% mean accuracy across 20 held-out simulation drivers. Cross-domain results further show feasible zero-shot simulation-to-real transfer and better real-world generalization when simulation data are combined with limited field data.

</details>


### [478] [Optimizer Memory Makes Shuffle Order a First-Order Source of Fine-Tuning Noise](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29554)
*John Sweeney*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 固定时钟优化器（如AdamW）中的顺序噪声比无记忆分析预测的更大，因其动量缓冲区、预条件状态和去偏计数器随步数推进而非学习率缩放时间τ=ηk，导致相同梯度获得位置相关的权重。在固定测量窗口下，当一阶重播系数非零时，会出现O(η)的等多重集对比，而常规和时钟匹配控制仍为O(η²)；即使仅使用固定β动量缓冲区也足以产生此效应。通过位级确定性重播从预热状态出发，可隔离该机制，得到AdamW、固定β动量和SGD的顺序方差斜率分别为1.83、2.00和4.00；将记忆时钟与τ对齐后恢复标准指数。对于冻结预条件器的AdamW，该脉冲加权核给出闭式渐近顺序方差下界，无需拟合参数。结果局部于测量窗口，但可提供顺序噪声误差条、位置归因权重及微调比较的种子预算准则。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 揭示固定时钟优化器中由顺序依赖性引入的额外噪声来源，其影响可能显著改变微调结果的可靠性，尤其在接近的A/B比较中。传统分析忽略这一效应，导致对随机性影响的低估。

Method: 采用提升状态展开方法分析固定时钟优化器的动态行为，通过位级确定性重播从预热状态重现训练过程，量化不同优化器的顺序方差，并推导出无需拟合的噪声大小估计公式。

Result: 发现固定时钟优化器在等多重集重排下存在O(η)的一阶顺序对比，显著高于传统预期的O(η²)；实测顺序方差斜率分别为AdamW: 1.83, 固定β动量: 2.00, SGD: 4.00；当记忆时钟与τ对齐时，回归至标准行为；对于冻结预条件的AdamW，可得闭式渐近顺序方差下界。

Conclusion: 顺序噪声在固定时钟优化器中是重要且可量化的一阶效应，不可忽视。研究提供了不依赖拟合的噪声评估方法，可用于指导微调实验设计，包括种子预算设定与结果解释。

Abstract: Shuffle order can be a larger source of fine-tuning noise than a memoryless analysis predicts: fixed-clock optimizer memory makes local equal-multiset contrasts first order in the learning rate rather than second order, and the resulting order channel can be large enough for a single seed to flip a close A/B comparison. We isolate this mechanism and derive a fit-free way to size the noise it produces. For a memoryless optimizer, reordering an equal multiset has no first-order endpoint term; the leading local contrast is the $O(η^2)$ gradient bracket. Fixed-clock optimizers such as AdamW are different. Their moment buffers, preconditioner state, and de-biasing counters advance with the step index rather than with the learning-rate-scaled time $τ=ηk$, so the same gradient can receive a position-dependent endpoint weight. For any fixed finite measurement window, a lifted-state expansion gives an $O(η)$ equal-multiset contrast whenever the first-order replay coefficient is nonzero, while regular and clock-matched controls remain $O(η^2)$; a bare fixed-$β$ momentum buffer is already enough. A bitwise-deterministic replay from one warmed optimizer state isolates the mechanism, giving order-variance slopes 1.83 for AdamW, 2.00 for fixed-$β$ momentum, and 4.00 for SGD; matching the memory clock to $τ$ restores the regular exponent. For AdamW with a frozen preconditioner, the same impulse-weight kernel gives a closed-form asymptotic order-variance floor after the local potentials are measured, with no fitted coefficients. The result is local to the measurement window (independent reshuffling can average the channel across windows), but it yields order-noise error bars, positional attribution weights, and a seed-budget criterion for fine-tuning comparisons.

</details>


### [479] [Persona-Trained Monte Carlo: Estimating Market-Outcome Distributions via Swarms of Persona-Conditioned Neural Policy Bots in a Limit Order Book](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29556)
*Salavat Ishbulatov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出PTMC方法，通过模拟由人格化神经策略交易机器人组成的群体在限价订单簿中的互动，估计市场结果统计分布。每个运行实例化多个共享同一策略网络但受不同个体抽样的性格参数调节的机器人，它们在连续双重拍卖中交互，生成的价格路径即为一次蒙特卡洛样本。重复独立的性格群体抽样可得到一个集合，从中估算目标市场统计量。随机性来源于性格抽样、运行内动作采样和可选外生冲击，不仅限于价格。该方法区别于经典蒙特卡洛、手工编码的基于代理模型、单智能体强化学习及基于大语言模型的生成代理。研究整合多学科基础，包括计算经济学、市场微观结构、行为金融、深度强化学习、生成/大语言模型代理、新闻驱动交易、系统性风险、经济物理学和博弈论，连接各文献与具体设计选择。形式化了PTMC估计器及其收敛性，指定候选机器人架构与训练目标，并提出四层次验证方法：典型事实匹配、微观结构与代理层面检查、历史压力测试对比零智能基线。框架尚未实现，贡献在于形式化估计器、跨学科设计论证与验证路线图，并提出开放研究问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统蒙特卡洛方法在金融建模中常仅以价格波动作为随机来源，难以捕捉市场参与者多样性与复杂互动。为更真实地模拟金融市场动态，需引入具有异质性行为特征的交易主体，同时保持可扩展性和可验证性。现有方法如手写规则代理模型缺乏灵活性，单智能体强化学习忽略群体互动，而大语言模型代理虽具生成能力但缺乏对市场机制的精确建模。因此，亟需一种融合行为多样性、市场机制精确性与可验证性的新型仿真框架。

Method: 提出Persona-Trained Monte Carlo (PTMC) 方法：使用统一训练的策略网络，通过从学习到的交易者异质性分布中采样个性化人格参数，生成多样化且行为各异的交易机器人；这些机器人在连续双重拍卖环境中交互，形成价格路径作为一次蒙特卡洛样本；通过多次独立的人格群体抽样，获得统计样本集以估计目标市场指标。随机性来自人格抽样、动作采样和可选外生冲击。采用跨学科理论指导网络结构、训练数据与验证流程设计，并构建四层验证体系（典型事实匹配、微观结构检查、代理层面检验、历史压力测试）。

Result: 成功形式化了PTMC估计器并分析其收敛性质；提出了合理的机器人架构与训练目标；建立了完整的四层次验证框架，可用于未来实证评估；明确了该方法在捕捉市场异质性、增强模拟真实性方面的潜力。尽管未实现完整系统，但提供了可执行的研究蓝图。

Conclusion: PTMC提供了一种新颖、严谨且可验证的市场模拟框架，能够有效捕捉交易者异质性与市场动态之间的复杂关系。其跨学科设计基础和可扩展的验证路径为未来研究奠定了坚实基础。当前工作为方法论奠基，后续需在实际系统中实现并验证其性能，解决诸如角色生成、训练稳定性、大规模仿真效率等关键挑战。

Abstract: We propose Persona-Trained Monte Carlo (PTMC), a method for estimating distributions of market-outcome statistics by repeatedly simulating limit-order-book interaction among swarms of persona-conditioned neural-policy trading bots. Each run instantiates many bots sharing one trained policy network but conditioned on heterogeneous, individually sampled persona parameters drawn from a learned trader-heterogeneity distribution; the bots interact in a continuous double auction, and the resulting price path is one Monte Carlo sample. Repeating this over independent persona-population draws yields an ensemble from which a target market statistic is estimated. Randomness enters through persona draws, within-run action sampling, and optional exogenous shocks, not solely through price as in classical Monte Carlo. We distinguish PTMC from adjacent paradigms, including classical Monte Carlo, hand-coded agent-based models, single-agent reinforcement learning, and large-language-model-based generative agents. To justify the design, we survey cross-disciplinary foundations -- agent-based computational economics, market microstructure, behavioral finance, deep reinforcement learning, generative/LLM-based agents, news-driven trading, systemic risk, econophysics, and game theory -- connecting each literature to a specific design choice in the policy network, training data, or validation protocol. We formalize the PTMC estimator and its convergence properties, specify a candidate bot architecture and training objective, and propose a four-level validation methodology: stylized-fact matching, microstructure- and agent-level checks, and historical stress-test comparison against a zero-intelligence baseline. The framework is proposed but not implemented: we contribute a formal estimator, a cross-disciplinary design justification, and a validation roadmap, and conclude with open research questions.

</details>


### [480] [Speculative Pre-Positioning: Decoding Stateful Sessions to the Next Decision Point Off the Critical Path](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29565)
*Victor Norgren*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 通过状态化会话和推测性预定位，将跨请求预填充和解码移出关键路径，实现首个令牌响应时间低至约1.0毫秒，相比传统前缀缓存的39毫秒有显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决状态无关推理服务器在请求间空闲时加速器资源浪费的问题，提升高并发场景下的推理效率与响应速度。

Method: 采用状态化会话回收空闲时间，利用目标模型自身前向传播进行推测性预定位，提前解码至下一决策点；通过置信度门控机制判断是否可直接返回缓存分布结果，避免解码开销。

Result: 在具备足够能力的模型上，置信度门控可达到近全覆盖率和约87%的精度，首个令牌响应时间降至约1.0毫秒，显著优于传统前缀缓存方案（39毫秒），仅增加少量能耗并伴随罕见且有限的误接受。

Conclusion: 该方法通过引入状态化会话与推测性预定位，有效提升了大模型推理服务的吞吐与延迟表现，尤其适用于高并发、低延迟场景。

Abstract: A stateless inference server (vLLM, SGLang, TensorRT-LLM) idles between requests while the accelerator waits; a stateful session reclaims that idle time. Speculative pre-positioning decodes the session forward to its next decision point with the target model's own forward pass and no draft model, moving the cross-request prefill and entry-decode off the critical path: the next request resumes from a pre-paid entry on its delta, or, when a confidence gate fires, is answered from a cached distribution in one near-constant vocabulary scan with no decode, at a cost only of energy and a rare, bounded false accept. The payoff is conditional on capability: a capable model fires the gate at near-full coverage and about 87% precision (a smaller one never clears it), returning the first token in about 1.0 ms versus the 39 ms decode a prefix cache still pays.

</details>


### [481] [The Joint Effect of Quantization and Sampling Temperature on LLM Safety Alignment: A Factorial Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29581)
*Hari Prasad,Ritam Pal*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本研究系统评估了模型量化精度（FP16、GPTQ INT8、AWQ INT4）与采样温度（T=0至1.0）对9个指令微调模型安全性的联合影响，共分析161种配置及约32.2万条响应。结果表明：标准非对抗性量化通常对安全性无显著负面影响，多数模型在INT4下攻击成功率保持不变或下降；而采样温度升高会显著增加脆弱模型的决策不稳定性（最高达53.0%的决策故障率），即使平均攻击成功率变化不大。量化与温度的交互效应并非“双重打击”，整体呈亚加性（-0.195至+0.045）。因此建议：对于强对齐模型，可合理采用INT4/INT8量化；但高温采样下的安全性评估应报告多样本稳定性，而非仅依赖平均攻击成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有安全评估通常将模型压缩和采样温度视为固定部署参数，忽视其在实际应用中可能共同影响模型安全性。尤其当模型被量化并以高温度采样时，是否会导致安全风险叠加？这一不确定性限制了对真实部署环境下模型安全性的可靠判断。

Method: 采用因子实验设计，覆盖6个模型家族的9个指令微调模型，3种精度（FP16、GPTQ INT8、AWQ INT4），6种采样温度（T=0至1.0），共构建161种配置。每种配置生成大量响应，并由六模型安全集成评估器进行判断，系统分析量化与温度对攻击成功率、决策稳定性及交互效应的影响。

Result: 1. 标准非对抗性量化（如INT4）对多数模型安全性影响中性甚至有益，7/9模型攻击成功率降低或维持；仅弱基线模型SmolLM3-3B出现明显退化（18.5%→36.0%）。2. 高温采样显著提升脆弱模型的决策不稳定性，决策故障率（DFR）达53.0%（T=1.0），而平均攻击成功率（ASR）变化较小。3. 量化与温度的交互效应为亚加性（-0.195至+0.045），未呈现系统性“双重惩罚”。

Conclusion: 对于强对齐模型，使用标准INT4/INT8量化是合理的；但在高采样温度下，安全性评估不应仅关注平均攻击成功率，而需额外报告多样本稳定性。量化与温度的组合效应并非必然恶化，关键在于模型本身的对齐强度。

Abstract: Modern LLM deployments routinely compress models and raise sampling temperature to reduce cost, latency, or repetition, yet safety evaluations usually treat these choices as fixed implementation details. This leaves a practical uncertainty: does a model that is safe at FP16 and greedy decoding remain safe after it is quantized and sampled stochastically, or do the two deployment knobs amplify one another? We study this question with a factorial evaluation of 9 instruction-tuned models from six families, 3 precisions (FP16, GPTQ INT8, AWQ INT4), and 6 temperatures ($T{=}0$ to $1.0$), yielding 161 configurations and $\approx$322k responses judged by a six-model safety ensemble. Contrary to the concern that low-bit deployment broadly erodes alignment, standard non-adversarial quantization is usually safety-neutral: INT4 keeps or lowers attack success for 7 of 9 models, with clear degradation concentrated in the weakest baseline model, SmolLM3-3B ($18.5\%{\to}36.0\%$). The larger risk comes from sampling: higher temperature sharply increases decision instability for vulnerable models, with DFR reaching 53.0\% at $T{=}1.0$, even when average ASR changes modestly. Finally, the interaction is not a ``double penalty'': our Compound Degradation Index remains largely sub-additive ($-0.195$ to $+0.045$), indicating that quantization and temperature do not systematically compound. These results suggest a deployment rule of thumb: standard INT4/INT8 quantization can be reasonable for strongly aligned models, but safety claims at elevated temperature should report multi-sample stability, not only average attack success.

</details>


### [482] [Bilevel Optimization for Neural Architecture Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29582)
*Abhishek Shukla,Ankur Sinha,Faiz Hamid*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文从双层优化的视角系统综述了神经网络架构搜索（NAS），将其方法分为基于采样的方法和基于双层理论的方法。后者通过辅助数学规划框架，利用二阶信息并确保模型参数最优性，实现架构与模型参数的协同优化，在准确性和效率上优于前者。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: NAS作为超参数优化的一个子领域，本质上是一个双层优化问题，但现有方法在理论一致性与优化效率方面存在不足，亟需更严谨的建模与求解框架。

Method: 提出一种基于辅助数学规划的双层优化框架，结合二阶信息，同时沿架构参数与模型参数的最优下降方向进行更新，实现更理论上一致的协同优化。

Result: 实验表明，基于双层理论的方法在准确率和计算效率上均显著优于基于采样的方法；该框架还可用于联合超参数与模型微调。

Conclusion: 采用双层优化理论指导的NAS方法具有更强的理论基础和性能优势，辅助数学规划框架为实现高效、可解释的架构搜索提供了新路径。

Abstract: Bilevel optimization has become an influential and widely adopted framework for addressing hierarchical optimization problems in machine learning, providing an effective approach to modeling the interaction between two levels of optimization, with applications such as hyperparameter tuning, meta-learning, adversarial training, and data poisoning. Neural Architecture Search (NAS), a subfield of hyperparameter optimization, is a prime example of a bilevel optimization problem, with architecture parameters optimized at the outer-level and network weights optimized at the inner level. This paper presents a structured overview of NAS through the lens of bilevel optimization. We categorize existing NAS approaches into two main classes: sampling-based methods, which search optimal architectures using different architecture samplers, and bilevel theory-based methods, which solve the architecture search problem using bilevel optimization principles. We further highlight our current research direction, wherein the bilevel NAS formulation is addressed through an auxiliary mathematical programming framework. This framework enables the systematic integration of second-order information from the model's training loss function and ensures the optimality of the model parameters while modifying architecture parameters. By simultaneously updating the architecture and model parameters along their respective optimal descent directions derived from the auxiliary mathematical program, these methods achieve more principled and theoretically consistent results. The same auxiliary program can also be used for simultaneous hyperparameter and model fine-tuning. A comparative analysis shows that bilevel theory-based approaches generally outperform sampling-based methods, both in accuracy and efficiency.

</details>


### [483] [STEMGym: Benchmarking Sequential Decision-Making under Dose Budgets in Autonomous Electron Microscopy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29592)
*Can Polat,Erchin Serpedin,Mustafa Kurban,Hasan Kurban*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 在扫描透射电子显微镜（STEM）中，研究发现感知（分析师）管道比导航策略对剂量效率的影响更大。通过引入STEMGym基准测试平台，研究证明使用训练好的CNN分析器配合简单扫描方式可使剂量效率提升5.5倍，而改进导航方法带来的提升不显著。此外，通用视觉-语言模型在特定任务上表现远差于专用CNN。该工作强调应将机器学习资源更多投向感知环节。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统观点认为更智能的导航（如贝叶斯或强化学习）是提高自主科学成像效率的关键，但在STEM中，每次测量都会造成电子束损伤，因此需要高效利用剂量。研究旨在挑战这一假设，明确感知与导航在剂量效率中的相对贡献。

Method: 构建STEMGym——一个包含15个物理模拟的STEM环境的开源基准，涵盖五种材料、三种难度等级和四种表征任务；使用剂量效率曲线面积（DEC-AUC）作为统一评估指标；对比33种不同代理配置下的表现，包括不同导航策略与感知模型的组合。

Result: 使用训练好的CNN分析师配合朴素光栅扫描的方案，使DEC-AUC达到0.287，相比无CNN的光栅扫描基线（0.052）提升了5.5倍；而更换为贝叶斯或自适应有限状态机导航并未带来统计上显著的提升；生产级视觉-语言模型在晶体缺陷分析任务中性能比专用CNN低约13倍。

Conclusion: 在自主电子显微镜中，感知管道是决定剂量效率的主要因素，而非导航策略。未来机器学习投入应优先聚焦于感知建模，而非导航优化。STEMGym提供了一个统一框架，用于验证和推进该方向的研究。

Abstract: A central premise of autonomous scientific imaging is that smarter navigation, whether Bayesian, RL-based, or otherwise adaptive, is the principal lever for sample-efficient acquisition. We present evidence to the contrary in scanning transmission electron microscopy (STEM), an atomic-resolution imaging modality whose every measurement deposits damaging electron dose. We introduce STEMGym, an open-source Gymnasium benchmark of 15 physics-simulated STEM worlds spanning five materials, three difficulty levels, and four characterisation tasks, scored by the Dose-Efficiency Curve area (DEC-AUC), a single scalar capturing the information-vs-dose Pareto frontier. Across 33 agent configurations under realistic dose budgets, the dominant determinant of dose efficiency is the analyst (perception) pipeline, not the navigator: pairing a trained CNN analyst with naïve raster scanning raises DEC-AUC by 5.5x over a CNN-free raster baseline (0.287 vs.\ 0.052), while substituting Bayesian or adaptive finite-state-machine navigation for raster yields no statistically significant further gain. Production-tier vision-language models further underperform task-specific CNNs by {\sim}13x on crystallographic defect analysis. By decoupling perception, navigation, and planning under a unified dose budget, STEMGym reframes where ML effort should be invested in autonomous electron microscopy and provides the measurement infrastructure to test it.

</details>


### [484] [How AI settled the complexity of the oldest SGD algorithm](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29593)
*Michał Dereziński,Xiaoyu Dong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文讲述了1937年斯蒂芬·卡兹马尔兹提出的线性方程组求解算法如何成为最早的随机梯度下降实例，并揭示了现代人工智能模型（如ChatGPT和Gemini）如何协同发现该算法的最坏情况复杂度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索卡兹马尔兹算法的理论极限，特别是其在最坏情况下的收敛复杂度，以深化对经典优化方法的理解，并揭示现代AI在数学发现中的潜力。

Method: 结合历史分析与人工智能辅助计算，利用大型语言模型进行推理与验证，模拟并分析卡兹马尔兹算法在极端条件下的行为表现。

Result: 成功确定了卡兹马尔兹算法在最坏情况下的复杂度界限，证实了其理论性能的边界，并展示了人工智能在数学研究中的协同创新能力。

Conclusion: 卡兹马尔兹算法虽古老，但其复杂度分析在现代AI助力下得以突破，彰显了经典算法与前沿技术融合的巨大潜力。

Abstract: In 1937, Stefan Kaczmarz proposed a simple algorithm for solving systems of linear equations. This algorithm turned out to be the earliest known example of stochastic gradient descent, a ubiquitous computing paradigm that drives the training of modern AI models such as ChatGPT and Gemini. Now, those AI models have joined forces to discover the worst-case complexity of the Kaczmarz algorithm. This paper tells the story of how it happened.

</details>


### [485] [Mechanistically Eliciting Latent Behaviors in Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29604)
*Andrew Mack,Nina Panickssery,Alexander Matt Turner*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为因果扰动激发（Causal Perturbative Elicitation, CPE）的无监督方法，用于发现大语言模型内部可解释的低秩适配器（LoRAs），以激发隐藏的行为模式。CPE通过基于启发式的张量分解算法分解深层Transformer层的计算过程，仅需单个样本即可高效学习大量可解释的LoRAs。尽管是无监督方法，其在某些任务上表现媲美有监督方法（如在Countdown任务中与GRPO相当）。CPE还能揭示隐藏故障模式（如‘装弱’行为），并有效缓解探索劫持等对齐失败问题，在多个基准测试中表现出优越的安全性与可控性。此外，它可用于初始化对齐基域，提升强化学习训练的稳定性，为系统化评估和对齐人工智能提供了强大工具。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为了发现大语言模型中隐藏的行为模式，以改进模型行为、评估潜在风险，并解决对齐问题，特别是针对探索劫持和对齐伪装等安全挑战。现有方法通常依赖大量数据或监督信号，效率较低且难以捕捉复杂行为。因此亟需一种高效、无监督且可解释的方法来探索模型内部权重空间中的潜在行为。

Method: CPE采用基于启发式张量分解的算法，对深层Transformer层的计算进行分解，自动识别出能引发特定行为的低秩适配器（LoRAs）。该方法不依赖标注数据，仅通过单个输入样本即可生成多样化的、可解释的扰动，从而激发模型的隐含行为。其核心在于在权重空间而非输出文本空间进行探索，避免了传统方法在生成空间中容易出现的探索劫持问题。

Result: CPE在多项任务中表现优异：在Countdown任务中与匹配运行时间的GRPO方法性能相当（Qwen3-8B：85% vs 87%）；成功恢复被密码锁定的BigCodeBench任务中85%的性能，揭示了‘沙袋’行为；显著减少甚至消除对齐伪装现象（Greenblatt et al., 2024）；并能有效初始化大型模型（如GPT-OSS-20B）进入对齐基域，防止奖励劫持。结果表明，该方法具备高度的数据效率和良好的安全性潜力。

Conclusion: CPE是一种高效、无监督且可解释的模型行为激发方法，能够系统地探索大语言模型的内在行为空间。它不仅提升了对模型潜在能力的可发现性，还在缓解对齐风险方面展现出巨大潜力，为人工智能系统的安全性评估与可控对齐提供了一个强有力的工具。

Abstract: We aim to discover diverse, generalizable perturbations of LLM internals that can surface hidden behavioral modes. Such perturbations could help reshape model behavior and systematically evaluate potential risks. We introduce Causal Perturbative Elicitation (CPE), an unsupervised method for discovering interpretable low-rank adapters (LoRAs) that can elicit these latent behaviors. CPE decomposes the computations of a deep transformer slice using a heuristic tensor-decomposition-based algorithm. CPE exhibits remarkable data efficiency, learning a large number of interpretable LoRAs from a single example. Even though CPE is unsupervised, we find that in some cases it can be competitive with supervised elicitation methods via brute-force enumerative search over weight space. For instance, CPE performs similarly to matched-wall-clock-time GRPO on the Countdown task for Qwen3-8B (85% vs 87%), demonstrating that CPE can efficiently elicit complex multi-token behaviors. Since CPE is unsupervised, it can also surface hidden failure modes, such as sandbagging, restoring 85% of locked BigCodeBench performance on a password-locked version of Llama3-70B introduced by Taylor et al. (2025). Additionally, since CPE explores behaviors in weight-space rather than token-space it can potentially ameliorate exploration hacking, a misalignment failure which may arise in sufficiently self-aware AI models (Ngo, 2022). In fact, we find that CPE virtually eliminates alignment-faking (Greenblatt et al., 2024) behavior in a Llama3-70B-based model organism developed by Hughes et al. (2025). Finally, we find that CPE can be used to initialize GPT-OSS-20B in an aligned basin when running GRPO on an environment prone to reward-hacking. By providing a data-efficient method to systematically explore the space of latent model behaviors, CPE yields a powerful tool for aligning AI systems and evaluating their safety.

</details>


### [486] [Does Role Specialization Matter for Explanation Faithfulness in Mixture-of-Experts?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29613)
*Yeji Kim,Housam Babiker,Mi-Young Kim,Randy Goebel*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出通过表示层去相关正则化来减少专家间潜在空间的表示重叠，从而提升Mixture-of-Experts（MoE）架构中基于角色解释的忠实性。实验表明，该方法在多个多模态基准上显著提升了可解释性指标（如充分性、完备性及AOPC），且不损害任务性能，适用于多种MoE结构，证明了表示分离对解释忠实性的普适促进作用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于角色的MoE架构虽赋予专家语义角色以增强可解释性，但专家间表示重叠可能削弱角色区分度，降低归因解释的忠实性，亟需解决这一问题。

Method: 引入表示层去相关正则化，显式降低专家在潜在空间中的相似性，促进专家间的表征分化与专业化。

Result: 在多个多模态数据集上，该方法显著提升解释的忠实性（如完备性、充分性、AOPC），同时保持任务性能；效果不仅限于角色感知架构，也适用于标准稀疏MoE，说明其具有通用性。

Conclusion: 仅依赖结构角色分解不足以保证解释忠实性，表示层分离是提升MoE系统可解释性的重要机制。开源代码与补充材料已发布以支持复现。

Abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures have recently been extended with role-based mechanisms for interpretability. This is typically done by assigning semantic roles to individual expert components, for example roles like synergy, redundancy, and uniqueness in multimodal settings. However, whether such structural role decomposition preserves explanation faithfulness of the overall architecture remains largely underexplored. We hypothesize that inter-expert representation overlap weakens effective role separation and degrades attribution-based faithfulness, even when semantic roles are explicitly defined. To address this limitation, we introduce representation-level decorrelation regularization to explicitly reduce inter-expert similarity in latent space. Using representation decorrelation objectives, we encourage clearer specialization among experts by minimizing representation overlap. Our experiments show that across multiple multimodal benchmarks, this separation consistently improves explanation faithfulness, as measured by comprehensiveness, sufficiency, and their Area Over the Perturbation Curve (AOPC) summaries, while preserving task performance. We further show that these improvements are not limited to role-based architectures such as Interpretable Multimodal Interaction-aware MoE (I2MoE). Similar trends are observed in a standard sparse MoE baseline, suggesting that representation-level separation may provide a more general mechanism for enhancing explanation faithfulness in MoE systems. Overall, our findings suggest that structural role decomposition alone may be insufficient to guarantee faithful explanations and that representation-level separation helps improve explanation faithfulness. To support reproducibility, the source code and supplementary material are publicly available at https://github.com/dut0817/FL-I2MoE_Decor.

</details>


### [487] [t-STEP: An interpretable model for Total Electron Content predictions and irregularities estimations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29644)
*Stephen Tete,Carl Shneider,Maxime Cordy,Claudio Cesaroni,Andreas Hein,Vasily Petrov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种可解释的机器学习模型 t-STEP，能够以30秒分辨率预测电离层总电子含量（TEC），并捕捉小尺度不规则性。该模型在高太阳活动期（2015年）达到91%准确率，均方误差为4.38 TECU，相比IRI-2020模型在准确性、误差降低和预测性能上均有显著提升。通过动态时间弯曲和SHAP分析验证了模型鲁棒性，并成功识别了地磁暴期间的TEC不规则动态与形态，优于基于注意力机制的LSTM模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器学习模型对TEC的预测多为小时级分辨率，难以保留电离层中小尺度不规则性特征，而高分辨率预测对于监测电离层动态变化至关重要，尤其在地磁扰动事件中。因此亟需一种高时空分辨率且可解释的模型来提升对TEC不规则性的捕捉能力。

Method: 采用全球定位系统（GPS）观测数据，基于太阳周期24期位于5.49°S, 47.49°W的站点数据，构建t-STEP模型，实现30秒级TEC预测；使用动态时间规整（DTW）进行多指标评估，并结合SHAP方法分析特征贡献，以增强模型可解释性。

Result: 30秒级预测在2015年高太阳活动期达到91%准确率，平均绝对误差为4.38 TECU；相比IRI-2020，准确率提高35%，绝对误差降低57%，预测技能提升54%；成功捕捉不同强度地磁暴下的TEC不规则动态与形态，优于注意力LSTM模型。

Conclusion: t-STEP模型展示了单一框架在高分辨率下对电离层不规则性进行可扩展监测的潜力，无需为每类瞬时事件单独建模，具有良好的应用前景。

Abstract: Earth system infrastructures relying on satellite-based technologies, such as Global Positioning System (GPS) communications, are affected by ionospheric Total Electron Content (TEC) gradients. Modeling these gradients under physical constraints remains challenging due to their dynamic and transient nature. While existing machine learning (ML) models can predict hourly TEC variations, it remains unclear whether their temporal resolution is sufficient to preserve small-scale TEC irregularities within predicted signals. To address this gap, we introduce an interpretable ML-based model, t-STEP, designed to predict TEC at a 30-second resolution and estimate irregularity signatures from the modeled signals. This high cadence enables the derivation of Rate of TEC changes (ROT) and the ROT Index (ROTI) as diagnostic indicators of ionospheric variability. The model is developed using GPS observations from solar cycle 24 at a station located at 5.49°S, 47.49°W. A multi-metric evaluation framework, including dynamic time warping, is used for robustness assessment, while SHAP (SHapley Additive exPlanations) provides insight into feature contributions. The 30-second TEC predictions achieve 91% accuracy with a mean absolute error (MAE) of 4.38 TECU during high solar activity (2015). Compared with the International Reference Ionosphere (IRI-2020), the hourly model improves accuracy by 35%, reduces absolute errors by 57%, and increases prediction skill by 54%. More importantly, the 30-second model captures TEC irregularity dynamics and morphologies during geomagnetic storms of different intensities, outperforming an attention-based Long Short-Term Memory model under the same experimental conditions. This study demonstrates the potential of a single TEC prediction framework for scalable irregularity monitoring without requiring separate models for individual transient events.

</details>


### [488] [Fuzzing Large Language Models to Elicit Hidden Behaviours](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29646)
*Mohammed Abu Baker,Lakshmi Babu-Saheer*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了针对睡眠代理后门模型的模糊测试方法，比较了权重和激活层加噪两种模糊方式与温度采样基线的效果。结果显示，在6个后门模型中，模糊测试在4个模型上表现优于温度采样（最高提升6倍），且效果依赖于任务类型，因此两者都应使用。然而，不同超参数组合的表现差异显著，最优配置比均匀搜索平均值高2-10倍，表明瓶颈在于超参数选择而非技术本身。为此，作者提出利用一个廉价的代理任务（上下文隐藏密钥）结合汤普森采样来选择候选超参数，并在真实后门任务上验证其有效性：代理任务指导下的模糊测试使激活模糊的触发率提升约4倍，权重模糊提升1.3-1.8倍。这是首个系统研究模糊测试在睡眠代理后门上的工作，也是首次证明代理任务可迁移至真实任务。作者建议报告结果时采用（均匀基线、代理选择、最优解）三元组以区分不同层次的结论。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前对睡眠代理后门的研究缺乏系统性，尤其在未知触发条件下如何有效激发其恶意行为尚未被充分探索。现有方法如温度采样效率有限，且超参数选择困难，亟需更高效、可扩展的探测机制。

Method: 采用高斯噪声注入模型权重或残差流激活的方式进行模糊测试；通过统一网格搜索与代理任务（上下文隐藏密钥）结合汤普森采样进行超参数优化；将代理任务选择的超参数应用于真实后门检测任务。

Result: 模糊测试在4/6模型上优于温度采样，最高提升6倍；最优超参数配置性能远超均匀搜索（2-10倍）；基于代理任务的超参数选择使激活模糊触发率提升约4倍，权重模糊提升1.3-1.8倍，接近最优表现。

Conclusion: 模糊测试是探测睡眠代理后门的有效手段，且超参数选择至关重要。通过代理任务引导的自适应选择策略可显著提升探测效率，建议未来研究采用（均匀基线、代理选择、最优解）三元组报告结果以增强可比性和透明度。

Abstract: Sleeper agents are the canonical model organism of deception: models trained to behave normally but to emit an unsafe behaviour on a specific trigger. Eliciting that behaviour without knowing the trigger has not been studied systematically. We study fuzzing: injecting Gaussian noise into a model's weights or residual-stream activations and checking whether the perturbed outputs reveal the behaviour. On 6 backdoored models (7B-13B) we compare both forms of fuzzing head-to-head against temperature-sampling baselines. Fuzzing elicits the hidden behaviour more often than temperature sampling on 4 of 6 models (up to ~6x on OpenHermes-13B), and which form wins depends on the task, so both are worth running. Elicitation is uneven across each method's hyperparameter grid: a uniform sweep gives only a few percent on most models, while the best cell is 2-10x higher, so the bottleneck is hyperparameter selection, not the technique. To select hyperparameters without ground-truth access, we use a cheap proxy task (in-context secret elicitation, where a base64-encoded secret is placed in the system prompt for the model to hide) and run Thompson sampling on it to pick candidate cells, which we evaluate on the real backdoor. On the four models that can decode the secret, proxy-selected cells raise activation-fuzzing elicitation ~4x over the uniform-sweep mean (recovering ~70% of the best-cell rate on the best performing model) and weight-fuzzing by 1.3-1.8x. To our knowledge this is the first systematic study of fuzzing on sleeper-agent backdoors and the first to show proxy-task hyperparameter selection transferring to real-task elicitation. We also propose reporting such results as a (uniform-baseline, proxy-selected, oracle) triple, since these are three distinct claims that prior work has often blurred.

</details>


### [489] [I-BBS: Coordinate-Free Inference of Latent Sub-Manifolds Using Random Distance Matrix Theory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29675)
*Igor Halperin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: I-BBS 是一种无需坐标系的方法，从高维距离矩阵中识别嵌入的低维流形，适用于无法完全观测或未定义的高维空间。通过两个对噪声稳定的整数特征——最高非Perron多重集的重数（决定维度 d）和多重集位置随噪声增长的无参数收缩规律——恢复潜在几何结构。在合成球面 $S^1$、$S^2$、$S^3$ 上，这些整数特征比连续谱斜率更稳定，且可仅凭一个距离矩阵盲测出流形与噪声模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统方法依赖于高维向量空间的完整可观测性，但在许多实际场景中（如神经网络表示、动态训练），该空间可能部分缺失或不存在。因此需要一种不依赖显式坐标、仅基于距离矩阵即可推断底层几何结构的方法。

Method: 提出 I-BBS 方法，建模两种生成性噪声（模型驱动与模型无关），利用双重整数稳定特征：一是最高非Perron多重集的重数以确定流形维度；二是多重集位置随噪声增长的无参数收缩规律，从而在噪声干扰下仍能准确恢复潜在流形结构。

Result: 在 $S^1$、$S^2$、$S^3$ 合成数据上，整数特征显著优于连续谱斜率的稳定性；单个距离矩阵即可实现对流形及噪声模型的盲识别。

Conclusion: I-BBS 提供了一种无需坐标系、鲁棒性强的流形学习框架，适用于不可观测或未知高维空间中的几何推断，具有广泛的应用前景，尤其在神经网络表征分析与动态系统建模中。

Abstract: Bogomolny, Bohigas and Schmit (BBS) found that the spectrum of the pairwise distance matrix on N points sampled from a smooth d-dimensional manifold encodes a signature of the underlying geometry. We develop I-BBS (Inference-BBS), a coordinate-free method that identifies a low-dimensional latent sub-manifold embedded in a high-dimensional ambient distance matrix alone, without accessing an ambient high-dimensional vector space. It therefore applies even when that space is only partly observable or undefined. We model the ambient embedding by two classes of generative noise, model-based and model-free. The noise mixes the latent signal with off-manifold components, so the eigenvalues reorganise collectively and the latent geometry cannot be read off eigenvalue by eigenvalue. We recover it instead from two integer-stable signatures that survive the noise: the multiplicity of the top non-Perron multiplet, which fixes $d$, and a parameter-free law for how the multiplet positions shrink as the noise grows. On synthetic spheres $S^1$, $S^2$ and $S^3$ these integer signatures are far more stable under noise than the continuous spectral slope, and a blind test recovers both the manifold and the noise model from a single distance matrix. Applications to neural-network representations and to the dynamic training regime are developed in two companion papers.

</details>


### [490] [Learning as Observable Matrix Dynamics: Diffusive Relaxations versus Phase Transitions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29679)
*Igor Halperin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: OMD 是一种诊断框架，通过固定大小的 $N \times N$ 距离矩阵 $M(t)$ 探测神经网络内部表示的高维动态，利用随机矩阵理论和粒子动力学分析谱重组，揭示训练过程中被标量损失函数忽略但具有信息量的几何变化。该方法扩展了 BBS 理论，提供逐快照的谱带结构与环境噪声诊断、轨迹级可观测量及 3D MDS 嵌入，将训练过程可视化为移动粒子云。实验表明，扩散区域缺乏稳定的谱带结构，而内生或外驱的突变则产生稳定指纹，对应于平滑或乘积潜在几何（BBS 相近情形）或有限簇、傅里叶孤子结构（其他情形），从而揭示表征的几何状态而非单一内在维度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统标量损失函数无法捕捉神经网络内部高维表示动态中的复杂几何变化，尤其在训练过程中发生的谱重组现象。因此需要一种能够探测内部表示动态并揭示其几何演化规律的新方法。

Method: 采用可观测矩阵动力学（OMD）框架，构建 $N \times N$ 距离矩阵 $M(t)$，结合随机矩阵理论与粒子动力学，基于扰动下的环境-潜在分解扩展 Bogomolny--Bohigas--Schmit (BBS) 理论，进行逐快照的谱带结构分析、环境噪声检测、轨迹级可观测量计算，并通过三维多维缩放（MDS）嵌入（使用前三个特征向量）可视化训练过程为移动粒子云。

Result: 在七个实验中，扩散阶段缺乏稳定的顶层谱带结构；而内源性或外部驱动的剧烈重组则形成稳定的几何指纹。这些指纹分别对应于平滑或乘积型潜在几何（符合 BBS 理论情形），以及有限簇或傅里叶孤子结构（非 BBS 相近情形）。结果表明，OMD 能有效识别表示空间的几何相态，而非仅报告单一内在维度。

Conclusion: OMD 提供了一种超越传统损失函数的神经网络训练过程诊断工具，能够揭示隐藏在高维表示中的几何动态，通过谱重组和粒子云演化明确区分不同几何相态，为理解深度学习模型的表征学习机制提供了新的视角。

Abstract: Observable Matrix Dynamics (OMD) is a diagnostic framework that probes the dynamics of high-dimensional internal representations of inputs by a neural network via a fixed-size $N \times N$ distance matrix $M(t)$ on a held set of $N$ inputs. OMD uses methods of random matrix theory and particle dynamics to explore spectral reorganisations that are missed by scalar loss functions, but are informative of the training process. We read $M(t)$ against a perturbative ambient-versus-latent decomposition extending the Bogomolny--Bohigas--Schmit (BBS) theory of random distance matrices, with per-snapshot diagnostics for the top-of-spectrum band structure and ambient noise, trajectory-level observables linking snapshots, and a 3D MDS embedding (bottom-three eigenvectors) rendering training as a moving particle cloud. Across seven experiments, diffusive regimes lack stable top-of-spectrum band structure, while sharp endogenous or externally driven reorganisations produce stable fingerprints: consistent with smooth or product latent geometries in BBS-adjacent cases, and with finite-cluster or Fourier-soliton structures otherwise. OMD thus reads the geometric regime of a representation rather than reporting a single intrinsic dimension.

</details>


### [491] [CAREBench: A Child-Safety Risk Benchmark for Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29685)
*Kaavya Krishna-Kumar,Elaine Lau,Vaughn Robinson,Jay Caldwell,Sheriff Issaka,Skyler Wang,Francisco Guzmán,Steven Kelling,Jonas Mueller*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了CAREBench，一个用于评估大语言模型在儿童安全方面上游风险的基准测试。该基准涵盖12种风险类别，如诱骗、欺骗、隐私侵犯等，不包含显性虐待内容，而是关注模型是否能识别、拒绝或引导潜在危险互动。评估七款前沿模型发现失败率在2%至58%之间，且不同风险类别表现差异明显。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有儿童安全评估主要针对儿童性虐待材料，但许多儿童安全问题始于更早阶段，如成人利用AI操纵、伪装、孤立未成年人，或导致儿童对AI产生情感依赖。因此需要一种能够检测这些早期风险的评估工具。

Method: 构建CAREBench基准，包含500个提示，覆盖12类儿童安全风险；结合家长和临床专家的响应标注，评估模型在不涉及显性内容的情况下识别和应对风险的能力。

Result: 在七个前沿模型上测试显示，失败率从2%到58%不等，不同风险类型的表现存在显著差异，表明当前模型在儿童安全防护上存在明显漏洞。

Conclusion: CAREBench为大语言模型开发者提供了一个负责任且聚焦于早期风险的评估工具，有助于识别并弥补儿童安全政策中的空白。

Abstract: How can we evaluate whether frontier AI systems recognize child-safety risks before they escalate into explicit harm? Existing child safety evaluations focus on child sexual abuse material, yet many child-safety failures begin earlier: in model assistance that helps adults manipulate, impersonate, profile, or isolate minors, and in model responses that deepen children's emotional dependence on AI systems rather than redirecting them toward human support. We introduce CAREBench (Child AI Risk Evaluation), a benchmark to assess such upstream child-safety risks in language models. CAREBench contains 500 prompts spanning twelve risk categories, including grooming and relationship engineering, deception and impersonation, surveillance and privacy, sextortion and sexual abuse, AI anthropomorphization, emotional dependency, and mental illness sensitivity. Developed with response annotations from parents and clinicians, the benchmark excludes explicit abuse material and imagery; instead, it evaluates whether models recognize, refuse, de-escalate, or redirect risky interactions before harm becomes overt. Evaluating seven frontier models on our benchmark, we find failure rates ranging from 2% to 58%, with failure patterns that vary across risk categories. CAREBench provides a responsibly scoped evaluation for LLM developers to identify and close gaps in child safety policies.

</details>


### [492] [IG-Lens: Exact Additive Probability Attribution Across Transformer Layers via Telescoping Integrated Gradients](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29693)
*Duc Anh Nguyen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出IG-Lens方法，通过积分梯度沿隐藏状态路径进行分层归因，实现目标概率变化的精确分解。该方法在概率空间中保持可加性，避免了传统方法的偏差与离散化误差，且支持单次前向传播批量计算。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在解码器仅变压器模型中对预测词元概率的分层归因存在近似、非单调或非可加性问题，尤其在概率空间中难以准确分解各层贡献。

Method: 采用沿隐藏状态路径的积分梯度（Integrated Gradients）的递推应用，将每一段归因于其终止层，并利用终点值的望远镜求和结构保证概率空间中的完全性。使用观测到的概率变化而非原始梯度作为权重，增强预测感知性。

Result: IG-Lens实现了目标概率变化在层间的精确可加分解，完整性在任意步数下精确成立（浮点精度内），并可通过单次前向传播完成批量计算，无须反向传播调用。

Conclusion: IG-Lens提供了一种精确、高效且具有预测感知性的分层归因方法，解决了概率空间中现有方法的局限性，适用于分析解码器仅变压器模型中各层对输出概率的实际贡献。

Abstract: We ask a simple question about decoder-only transformers: \emph{between which two layers is the probability of a predicted token actually produced?} Existing layer-wise readout tools answer only approximately. The logit lens and its trained variant report a per-layer \emph{level} of probability but give no additive decomposition; their estimates are biased and non-monotone across depth. Direct Logit Attribution and related residual-stream methods are additive, but only in \emph{logit} space -- the softmax nonlinearity breaks additivity in probability space, precisely the quantity one usually cares about. Layer Conductance integrates gradients per layer, but attributes each to its own baseline and so does not sum to the total change in prediction. We introduce \textbf{IG-Lens}, a telescoping application of Integrated Gradients along a single path through the hidden states from a baseline to the final layer. Crediting each segment to the layer it terminates at yields a layer-wise attribution whose sum is \emph{exactly} the change in target probability, with the softmax inside the integration path rather than linearized away. Our default estimator credits each integration step its \emph{observed} change in target probability -- a prediction-aware reweighting in the spirit of IDGI -- rather than its raw gradient. Because the readout is a one-dimensional probability, this collapses each segment to a telescoping sum of endpoint values, so completeness holds exactly (to floating point) at \emph{any} step count, removing Riemann discretization error while suppressing steps that show gradient sensitivity without a change in output. We give the telescoping identity and its proof, verify completeness to floating point, and describe a single-pass batched implementation computing the full token-by-layer map without any backward call. Code: https://github.com/anhnda/IGLens.

</details>


### [493] [A Diagnostic Framework and Multi-Evaluator Audit of Evaluator-Driven Preference Dynamics in Self-Adapting LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29719)
*Liu Zewen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究揭示了专有大模型评估器的测量结果可能在数周内失效，并提出EPC框架（包含多模态偏好崩溃指数MPCI、评估器索引耦合矩阵和Jensen-Shannon散度JSD）来诊断此类问题。在八个实验条件下（共122次重复），耦合系数范围为0.00至1.18，变异系数约0.9，其中四组显示强耦合（如GPT-4o May、Qwen3.7-plus等），四组趋近于零（如GPT-4o June、DeepSeek自评等）。特别地，GPT-4o从五月到六月的漂移现象导致研究结论反转，凸显评估器自身不稳定性。自评估几乎完全崩溃（97%输出为零，JSD=0.003），可能存在下限效应。输出格式混淆分析显示整体相关性高（rho=0.89），但个体实例相关性低（rho=0.219，p=0.093）。研究强调，问题不在于单一耦合值，而在于版本依赖的不稳定性，使得单次快照评估不可靠。所有数据与EPC工具已公开。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有专有大模型评估器的测量结果可能随时间迅速失效，缺乏对评估器稳定性的系统性检测方法，导致基于单次快照的评估研究不可靠。

Method: 提出EPC框架，包括多模态偏好崩溃指数（MPCI）、评估器索引耦合矩阵和Jensen-Shannon散度（JSD），应用于8个实验条件共122次重复测试，通过耦合系数和分布变化分析评估器稳定性，并进行自评估与输出格式混淆的深入分析。

Result: 八组实验中，四组呈现强耦合（如GPT-4o May、Qwen3.7-plus），四组趋于崩溃（如GPT-4o June、DeepSeek自评）；GPT-4o从五月到六月的漂移导致研究结论反转，表明评估器自身不稳定；自评估几乎完全失效（97%零输出，JSD=0.003）；输出格式混淆在整体层面相关性强但在个体层面弱。

Conclusion: 评估器的版本依赖性不稳定性是普遍现象，单一快照评估无法反映真实性能，必须采用动态监测框架如EPC来确保评估可靠性。所有数据与工具已开源。

Abstract: Measurements of proprietary LLM evaluators can become invalid within weeks -- we document one case and provide the diagnostic framework to detect it. We introduce EPC -- comprising the Multimodal Preference Collapse Index (MPCI), evaluator-indexed coupling matrix, and Jensen-Shannon divergence (JSD) -- and apply it across eight experimental conditions (N=112 main + N=10 ablation = 122 unique repetitions, all reported). Coupling coefficients range from 0.00 to 1.18 across per-condition means (CV approx 0.9, n=8 conditions). Four conditions show strong coupling (N=36; GPT-4o May, GPT-4o-mini, Qwen3.7-plus, DashScope 30r); four collapse to near-zero (N=76; GPT-4o June, qwen-plus N=30, symmetric LR, DeepSeek self-eval). The May-to-June GPT-4o drift -- an N=8 re-replication inverting the study's conclusion -- is the most informative measurement: a diagnostic instrument detecting its own instability demonstrates the fragility it was designed to measure. Self-evaluation (97% zero, JSD=0.003) consistently collapses, though floor effects are possible. Output-format confound analysis finds per-strategy aggregate rho=0.89 but per-instance rho=0.219 (p=0.093); PCI reported as preference-convergence metric. We release EPC with all data. The finding is not any single coupling magnitude but the pattern of version-conditional instability that makes single-snapshot evaluator studies unreliable.

</details>


### [494] [The Hidden Cost of Resampling: How Imbalance Correction Degrades Probability Calibration in Tree Ensembles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29720)
*Zewen Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SMOTE causes minor calibration issues but improves discrimination; random undersampling severely harms calibration, especially with high imbalance; post-hoc recalibration (Platt/isotonic) effectively fixes calibration without losing ranking performance; prior-shift correction doesn't work for SMOTE due to density distortion. Recommend reporting calibration and recalibrating after resampling when probabilities matter.


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: To evaluate the impact of synthetic oversampling (SMOTE) and random undersampling on probability calibration in class-imbalanced classification, and to provide practical guidance on when and how to fix calibration issues.

Method: Experiments on five public datasets (imbalance ratio 1.9–70) using two ensemble models (random forest, gradient boosting), ten seeds, paired statistical tests, and evaluation of calibration (ECE) and discrimination (AUC). Tested SMOTE, random undersampling, and post-hoc recalibration (Platt/isotonic). Analyzed prior-shift correction applicability.

Result: (1) SMOTE has small calibration cost (ECE +0.009; Cliff's delta = +0.27); discrimination gains outweigh penalty. (2) Undersampling causes severe calibration damage (ECE up to 0.395 at IR=70), worsened by small training sets. (3) Post-hoc recalibration reduces ECE by up to 66% with negligible AUC loss. (4) Prior-shift correction fails for SMOTE due to class-conditional density distortion.

Conclusion: Calibration should be reported alongside discrimination in imbalanced learning studies. Practitioners should recalibrate predicted probabilities after resampling when they inform decisions. SMOTE’s calibration cost is manageable; undersampling is more harmful and requires careful handling.

Abstract: Resampling methods such as SMOTE and random under/over-sampling are standard tools for class-imbalanced classification, almost always evaluated by minority-class accuracy or F1. Prior work has established that undersampling degrades probability calibration by distorting the training prior [1]. We extend this lens to synthetic oversampling (SMOTE) and provide a practical, evidence-based guide to when calibration damage matters and how to fix it. Across five public datasets (imbalance ratio 1.9-70) and two ensemble models (random forest, gradient boosting), with ten seeds and paired statistics, we find: (1) SMOTE's calibration cost is real but small (ECE +0.009; Cliff's delta = +0.27, small-to-moderate) across the studied imbalance range (IR 1.9-70) and its discrimination gains typically outweigh the calibration penalty; (2) random undersampling is the genuine danger -- its damage grows sharply with imbalance, inflating ECE from 0.008 to 0.395 on a dataset with ratio 70, largely because the resulting training sets are too small to estimate probabilities reliably; (3) a single post-hoc recalibration step (Platt or isotonic) eliminates the damage, reducing ECE by up to 66% at a negligible ranking-power cost (AUC -0.002, Cliff's delta = -0.07); and (4) the analytic prior-shift correction that repairs undersampling does not transfer to SMOTE, because SMOTE distorts the class-conditional density rather than only the prior -- so data-driven recalibration remains necessary. We recommend that imbalanced-learning studies report calibration alongside discrimination, and that practitioners recalibrate after resampling whenever predicted probabilities drive decisions.

</details>


### [495] [Redefining Maritime Anomaly Detection via Equation-Grounded Synthetic Anomalies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29721)
*Youngseok Hwang,Sungho Bae,Dohun Lee,Jaeeun Seo,Jeehong Kim,Wonhee Lee,Hyunwoo Park*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于方程的海事异常分类体系，涵盖单船与船舶间异常，包括意外AIS活动（A1）、航路偏离（A2）和近距离接近（A3），并设计了统一的评分-合成-标签流程，结合大模型生成合理性评分以实现时间戳级标注。同时构建了考虑时间窗口长度和异常类型组成的基准评估设置，系统性评估多种时序与异常检测模型，推动海事异常检测方法的标准化评价。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有海事异常检测研究受限于缺乏预定义异常标签，依赖统计稀有性或专家标注，前者难以反映实际关键事件，后者成本高、主观性强且难扩展；同时忽视船舶交互引发的近距危险事件，亟需一种可扩展、基于有限AIS数据的系统化异常分类与评估框架。

Method: 提出方程驱动的异常分类体系（A1/A2/A3），设计基于大模型引导的合理性评分机制，构建评分-合成-标签一体化流程，生成时间粒度的异常标签，并建立多维度基准评估设置，涵盖不同时间窗口长度与异常类型组合，用于系统评估各类时序与异常检测模型。

Result: 所提框架能够有效识别单船及船舶间异常，尤其在近距接近等交互型风险事件中表现突出；基准评估揭示不同模型在各类异常上的性能差异，为海事异常检测提供可复现、可比较的评测基础。

Conclusion: 本研究构建了一个可扩展、基于有限观测的海事异常检测分类与评估体系，通过融合大模型指导与结构化分类，实现了高质量异常标注与系统性模型评估，为未来海事安全与智能交通管理提供坚实方法支持。

Abstract: Maritime anomaly detection is essential for ensuring maritime safety, security, and efficient traffic management at sea, with Automatic Identification System (AIS) data serving as a primary data source. Despite its importance, most publicly available AIS datasets lack predefined anomaly labels, forcing prior studies to rely on either distribution-based rarity or domain rule/expert-assisted labeling. These approaches, however, face fundamental limitations: statistical rarity often fails to reflect practically critical events, while expert-based labeling is costly, subjective, and difficult to scale. Moreover, both paradigms tend to overlook interaction-driven hazards such as near-miss approaches between vessels. To address these challenges, we propose an equation-grounded anomaly taxonomy that is implementable under a limited AIS observation schema and extensible to other AIS datasets. Specifically, the taxonomy defines three anomaly types: unexpected AIS activity (A1), route deviation (A2), and close approach (A3), covering both single-vessel and inter-vessel anomalies. Building on this taxonomy, we introduce a unified score-synthesize-label pipeline that produces LLM-guided plausibility scores, uses them to synthesize anomalies, and assigns timestamp-level labels. To rigorously assess detection performance, we further design benchmark evaluation settings that account for variations in temporal-window length and anomaly-type composition, and evaluate a broad range of time-series models and anomaly detection models. Together, these contributions provide a systematic basis for evaluating maritime anomaly detection methods across different anomaly types. Our code is available at https://github.com/snudial/open-maritime-anomaly-detection.

</details>


### [496] [ScaleAware-JEPA: Latent Representation for Discovery in Multiscale Physical Fields](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29723)
*Guang-Xing Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出ScaleAware-JEPA框架，通过约束扩散分解（CDD）将连续标量场分解为像素对齐的尺度成分，并利用尺度坐标定义掩码几何，使JEPA目标函数预测隐藏结构时与各成分的扩散尺度相关联，而非固定图像块大小。该方法在磁流体湍流、星际分子气体和城市夜间光照结构等场景中成功学习到与物理形态一致的密集结构图谱，无需标签或预设分割规则。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准自监督方法在固定图像坐标下定义上下文和目标，难以适应具有多尺度结构的连续物理场；而这些场的有用坐标在事先未知，需要一种能与尺度层次结构对齐的新型预测任务设计。

Method: 采用约束扩散分解（CDD）分离连续标量场为不同尺度成分，并基于其扩散尺度构建掩码几何；在此基础上，设计一种与尺度相关的JEPA目标函数，实现对隐含结构的预测。

Result: 在磁流体湍流、星际分子气体和城市夜间光照数据上，模型学习到的潜在坐标能准确映射出连贯的物理形态，生成无需标签的密集结构图谱，揭示复杂模式的内在组织方式。

Conclusion: 通过将潜在预测任务与场的尺度层次结构绑定，ScaleAware-JEPA能够自动构建可用于观察复杂物理模式的潜在坐标体系，为未预先定义结构的科学数据提供可解释的分析工具。

Abstract: Continuous physical fields represent a large fraction of data under scientific investigation. Their multiscale structures are central to discovery, yet useful coordinates are not known in advance. Standard self-supervised methods define context and targets in fixed image coordinates, posing a predictive task misaligned with fields organized across a continuous scale hierarchy. We introduce ScaleAware-JEPA, a framework that constructs dense, label-free latent coordinates for continuous scalar fields. Constrained Diffusion Decomposition (CDD) separates each field into pixel-registered scale components and provides the scale coordinates that define the masking geometry. The resulting JEPA objective predicts hidden structure with a context footprint tied to the diffusion scale of each component rather than to an arbitrary patch size. Across MHD turbulence, interstellar molecular gas and urban nighttime-light structure, the learned geometry maps back to coherent morphology, forming dense structural atlases without labels or predefined segmentation rules. By tying latent prediction to the scale hierarchy of a field, ScaleAware-JEPA constructs latent coordinates through which complex physical patterns can be inspected before their relevant structures have been prescribed. Code is available at https://github.com/gxli/SA-JEPA.

</details>


### [497] [Simplifying Flow Matching Transformations with Low-Rank Mixture Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29724)
*Liam A. Kruse,Houjun Liu,Alexandros E. Tzikas,Mansur M. Arief,Mykel J. Kochenderfer*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出使用混合概率主成分分析（MPPCA）作为归一化流的潜在分布，以减少数据与潜在分布之间的拓扑不匹配，从而简化流变换、加快训练速度并提升生成性能。MPPCA可通过EM算法快速低成本拟合，适用于高维生成任务。在表格和图像数据集上均验证了该方法在训练效率和生成质量上的持续优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统归一化流使用标准正态分布作为潜在分布，但其与数据分布存在拓扑不匹配，导致学习复杂度增加、训练缓慢且性能不佳。为解决这一问题，需选择更贴近数据分布的潜在分布以降低建模难度。

Method: 采用混合概率主成分分析（MPPCA）作为归一化流的潜在密度，利用其对数据分布的良好逼近能力，通过最小化KL散度实现更自然的映射；同时借助期望最大化（EM）算法高效初始化潜在分布，提升训练效率。

Result: 在多个表格和图像数据集上，所提方法显著提升了训练收敛速度，并在生成样本质量方面优于现有基线模型，证明了其有效性和实用性。

Conclusion: 使用MPPCA作为归一化流的潜在分布可有效缓解拓扑不匹配问题，使流变换更简单、训练更快、生成效果更好，且具备良好的可扩展性，适用于高维生成任务。

Abstract: Normalizing flows are powerful generative models that learn an invertible mapping between complex data distributions and simple latent distributions, typically a standard normal density. However, this choice of latent density can impose unnecessary complexity on the learned flow transformation due to the topological mismatch between the latent and data densities, leading to slower training and suboptimal performance. In this work, we propose using mixtures of probabilistic principal component analyzers (MPPCA) as the latent density for normalizing flows. We simplify the learned flow transformation by learning a latent distribution that more closely aligns with the data distribution in terms of KL divergence, thus enabling faster convergence and improved generative performance. Critically, MPPCA models can be fit quickly and cheaply using the expectation-maximization algorithm, making them a practical choice for initializing latent distributions even in high-dimensional generative tasks. We validate our method on both tabular and image datasets, demonstrating consistent gains in training efficiency and generation quality compared to baselines.

</details>


### [498] [Optimizing Nursing Care Taxi Dispatch Leveraging Integer Linear Programming Solvers and Machine Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29725)
*Riku Nakao,Akihito Hiromori,Hamada Rizk,Hirozumi Yamaguchi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为Nursing Care Taxi Dispatch的新车辆调度优化问题，作为车辆路径问题的变体，考虑了轮椅使用、用户兼容性、接送时间及车辆限制等多重复杂约束。针对现有基于神经网络的方法难以处理此类复杂约束的问题，本文采用基于Transformer架构的监督学习方法，并通过整数线性规划求解器生成高质量训练数据。引入后处理机制确保所有约束满足。实验基于真实设施数据，对比了多种方法在运行时间、执行时间和约束违反率上的表现，结果表明所提方法在各类问题规模和区域中均实现了更低的运营时间（最多降低8%），同时保持极低的约束违反率，展现出良好的平衡性与实用性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统车辆路径问题的神经网络方法通常仅处理简单约束，而实际护理接送场景涉及轮椅使用、用户兼容性、时间窗、车辆容量等多重复杂约束，导致可选节点减少，求解难度显著增加。如何在保证约束满足的前提下，实现高效且高质量的调度方案，成为亟待解决的问题。

Method: 提出一种基于Transformer架构的监督学习方法：首先利用整数线性规划求解器生成高质量基准解，用于训练模型；随后对模型生成的路径进行后处理，以确保所有复杂约束被严格满足。该方法兼顾计算效率、解的质量与约束遵守能力。

Result: 在真实世界数据集上，所提方法在所有问题规模和区域中均显著降低了运营时间（最高达8%），同时保持极低的约束违反率，优于传统的ILP方法和现有机器学习方法，在运行时间、解质量与约束满足之间取得良好平衡。

Conclusion: 本研究成功构建了一个适用于复杂护理接送场景的车辆调度优化框架，提出的基于Transformer的监督学习方法结合后处理策略，能够有效应对多约束下的调度难题，为智能交通与公共服务优化提供了可行的技术路径。

Abstract: In this paper, we formulate a new vehicle dispatch optimization problem, called Nursing Care Taxi Dispatch, as a variant of the Vehicle Routing Problem, considering constraints related to wheelchair use, user compatibility, pick-up and drop-off times, and vehicle limitations. Previous neural-based methods for Vehicle Routing Problems have typically addressed a few simple constraints, while our new problem involves multiple complex constraints, resulting in having fewer destinations to select. This complexity makes it more difficult to obtain solutions that allow all nodes to be visited with a limited number of vehicles. To balance low violation rate, computational efficiency, and solution quality, we propose a supervised machine learning approach based on the Transformer architecture. We first obtain a set of high-quality solutions using an integer linear programming solver for given inputs and then train our learning model through supervised learning. Additionally, we introduce the post-processing of the paths generated by the learning model, ensuring that all constraints are satisfied. We compared each instance's objective function value (operating time), execution time, and constraint violation rate across different methods: our proposed method and some existing methods including integer linear programming and machine learning-based methods, using real-world facility data. Our method successfully produced balanced solutions regarding operating time, execution time, and constraint violation rate. Notably, we observed a decrease in the operating time for all problem sizes and regions, while keeping constraint violations to a minimum compared to existing methods. Especially, the decrease reached up to 8% for problem sizes with fewer than 30 users.

</details>


### [499] [PS-PPO: Prefix-Sampling PPO for Critic-Free RLHF](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29758)
*Doo Hwan Hwang,Kee-Eung Kim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PS-PPO 是一种高效的无评论者强化学习方法，通过采样轨迹前缀进行梯度更新，显著降低计算开销和显存占用，同时保持与现有基线相当的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有无评论者方法对整个轨迹均匀传播学习信号，导致长推理路径的优化成本过高，尽管中间前缀已能决定最终结果。

Method: 提出基于提示的截断分布，为每条轨迹采样一个截断时间步，仅回传该前缀部分的梯度，并使用重要性加权校正以保证估计无偏。

Result: 在数学推理和RLHF基准测试中，PS-PPO 显著减少训练计算量和峰值GPU内存，同时保持高精度。

Conclusion: PS-PPO 有效利用了轨迹中的时间冗余性，是一种高效且准确的无评论者强化学习方法，适用于大规模语言模型的对齐训练。

Abstract: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) for Large Language Models increasingly relies on critic-free methods as a practical alternative to actor--critic training. Despite their simplicity, existing critic-free approaches propagate a trajectory-level learning signal uniformly across all tokens in a trajectory. This requires full-trajectory policy updates for every rollout, leading to substantial optimization cost for long reasoning traces, even though intermediate prefixes often contain enough information to largely determine the final outcome. We propose Prefix-Sampling Proximal Policy Optimization (PS-PPO), a compute-efficient critic-free method for RLHF that exploits this temporal redundancy. PS-PPO introduces a prompt-conditioned cutoff distribution and samples a cutoff timestep for each trajectory. During the update pass, PS-PPO backpropagates only through the sampled prefix of each trajectory and applies an importance-weighting correction so that the resulting truncated gradient estimator remains unbiased with respect to the full-trajectory objective. Experiments on mathematical reasoning and RLHF benchmarks show that PS-PPO achieves large reductions in training compute and peak GPU memory, while maintaining accuracy comparable to strong critic-free baselines.

</details>


### [500] [GLIP: Graph and LLM Joint Pretraining for Graph-Level Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29773)
*Haoxin Sun,Yiqing Lin,Yajun Huang,Chenhui Dong,Mingjun Li,Zhongzhi Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出GLIP框架，通过图增强和多标记选择策略生成正负样本，结合扩散投影丰富上下文信息，利用联合目标融合LLM语义判断与对比对齐损失，实现图级任务的高效预训练，显著提升图分类与推理性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有GNN与LLM结合研究多集中于节点和边级任务，图级任务因需捕捉复杂结构与特征信息而未被充分探索；同时，图预训练大多仅针对GNN，缺乏对LLM的整合，导致标签稀缺问题难以缓解。

Method: GLIP采用图增强构建正负样本对，引入多标记选择策略识别结构与特征中具有信息量的片段，并通过基于扩散的投影器注入上下文信息，最终使用联合目标函数融合LLM的语义判断与对比对齐损失，实现跨层次的一致监督。

Result: 在多个图级分类与推理任务上，GLIP显著优于现有最先进方法，且在有限标注数据下仍表现优异，验证了其有效性与泛化能力。

Conclusion: GLIP为图级任务提供了有效的图-语言模型联合预训练范式，有效融合了结构与语义信息，在标签稀缺场景下展现出强大潜力，推动了图神经网络与大语言模型的深度融合。

Abstract: Graphs are widely used to model relational systems, with applications in domains such as social networks, finance, and biomedicine. Graph neural networks (GNNs) have become a mainstream approach for learning graph representations. With the rise of large language models (LLMs), recent studies have attempted to combine GNNs with LLMs. However, most existing works concentrate on node-level and edge-level tasks, while graph-level tasks, which require capturing more complex structural and feature information, remain relatively underexplored. Moreover, graph pretraining is a widely adopted strategy to alleviate the challenge of label scarcity. Most existing approaches are designed solely for GNNs such as GraphCL, leaving LLMs uninvolved in the process. To address these limitations, we propose GLIP, a Graph-LLM JoInt Pretraining framework for graph-level tasks. GLIP first performs graph augmentation to construct positive and negative pairs and introduces a multi-token selection strategy to identify patches informative in both structure and features. It further leverages a diffusion-based projector to enrich them with contextual information, enabling GLIP to capture signals from both global and local perspectives. Finally, GLIP employs a joint objective that integrates the LLM's semantic judgments with a contrastive alignment loss, ensuring consistent supervision at both the semantic and structural levels. After pretraining, GLIP is fine-tuned with limited labeled data for downstream tasks, and extensive experiments show that it outperforms state-of-the-art methods on graph-level classification and reasoning tasks. Our source code is publicly available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/GLIP.

</details>


### [501] [Towards Generalizable and Evidential Nuclear Magnetic Resonance-Based Molecular Structure Elucidation via Large Language Model Agent](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29776)
*Zheng Fang,Chen Yang,Yusen Tan,Yunpeng Zhao,Fanjie Xu,Hongxin Xiang,Hanyu Sun,Hanyu Gao,Xiaojian Wang,Wenjie Du,Yuqiang Li,Jun Xia*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: NMRAgent 是一个基于大语言模型的证据推理代理，结合了专门的光谱分析工具和化学知识图谱，能够模拟人类专家的演绎推理过程，实现对未知分子结构的可解释性解析。它在复杂光谱分析中表现出色，显著提升了准确率与相似性指标，并成功应用于新天然产物结构解析及文献结构纠错。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前NMR结构解析依赖人工经验，现有AI方法存在两大局限：数据库检索无法识别新骨架，而从头生成模型缺乏原子级可解释性，难以满足科学验证需求。因此亟需一种兼具高精度与透明推理能力的新方法。

Method: NMRAgent 通过整合大语言模型、光谱分析工具与化学知识图谱，构建了一个具备规划能力的智能代理。其流程包括：根据输入的NMR谱图与分子式制定解析策略；生成候选结构；验证峰-原子对应关系；利用公式感知的片段优化技术修正不一致的子结构。整个过程强调证据链驱动的可解释性推理。

Result: 在包含新颖骨架的分架基准测试中，NMRAgent 将Top-1准确率提升46.5%，Tanimoto相似性提高0.502；成功解析两种来自Hydrangea davidii和Vitex trifolia的未知天然产物结构，并纠正了已有文献中的结构误标。

Conclusion: NMRAgent 实现了高精度预测与透明、证据驱动的推理相结合，为分析化学中的可解释人工智能树立了新范式，推动了自动化分子结构解析的发展。

Abstract: Nuclear Magnetic Resonance (NMR) spectroscopy is the gold standard for molecular structure elucidation, yet interpreting complex spectra for unknown molecules remains a bottleneck reliant on human expertise. While artificial intelligence has advanced this field, current methods face a critical trade-off: database retrieval cannot identify novel scaffolds, while de novo molecular structure elucidation models operate as black boxes, lacking the atom-level interpretability required for rigorous scientific validation. Here, we present NMRAgent, an evidential reasoning agent powered by large language models (LLMs) that bridges this gap by integrating specialized spectral analysis tools with chemical knowledge graphs. Unlike previous approaches, NMRAgent mimics the deductive reasoning of human experts: it takes experimental NMR spectra and molecular formula as input, plans the elucidation process, proposes candidate structures, verifies peak-atom consistency, and refines misaligned substructure through formula-aware fragment optimization. Enabled by its evidential reasoning, NMRAgent outperforms state-of-the-art methods, improving top-1 accuracy by 46.5% and Tanimoto similarity by 0.502 on a scaffold-split benchmark with novel scaffolds in the test set. Besides, we demonstrate the agent's practical utility by elucidating the structures of two previously unknown natural products isolated from Hydrangea davidii and Vitex trifolia, and by correcting structural misassignments in established literature. By combining high-accuracy prediction with transparent and evidence-based reasoning, NMRAgent establishes a new paradigm for interpretable AI in analytical chemistry.

</details>


### [502] [MemLeak: Diagnosing Information Leaks in Multimodal Agent Memory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29788)
*Kuan Wang,Chao Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究揭示了多模态AI代理在删除文本记忆后，仍可通过保留的图像信息恢复敏感事实，提出信息溯源图（IPG）分类内存表示的可删除性，并构建了MemLeak基准测试。结果显示，直接探测删除系统成功率不足1%，但相关文本可恢复18.3%，图像可恢复12.0%；47%的图像泄露无法通过文本恢复。内容感知语义删除将图像残留降至2.0%。结果在多个VLM、生产级系统及真实照片中均成立，且经双标注者验证具有高一致性（kappa=0.88）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前多模态AI系统的记忆删除机制仅清除文本条目，但忽略了图像中隐含的视觉线索可能使被删除的事实仍可被恢复，存在严重的隐私泄露风险，亟需系统性评估与改进。

Method: 提出信息溯源图（IPG）以分类记忆表示的删除可行性；构建MemLeak基准测试，评估从直接探测到文本关联再到图像残留的多阶段泄露；采用内容感知语义删除策略降低图像残留；通过真实数据和双标注者验证结果可靠性。

Result: 直接探测删除系统成功率为<1%；相关文本可恢复18.3%；保留图像可恢复12.0%；47%的图像泄露无法通过文本恢复；内容感知语义删除使图像残留降至2.0%；结果在多种模型、系统和真实图像中具有一致性。

Conclusion: 现有记忆删除机制在多模态场景下存在显著漏洞，图像中隐含的信息可绕过删除操作导致事实泄露。信息溯源图（IPG）为理解此类问题提供了框架，而内容感知语义删除是有效缓解手段，未来需建立更全面的多模态记忆删除标准。

Abstract: When a multimodal AI agent is asked to forget a fact, current memory systems usually delete the text entry and report success. We find that the fact can remain recoverable from retained user images, including images tagged to entirely different facts, because VLMs use implicit visual cues at inference time. We introduce the Information Provenance Graph (IPG), a taxonomy that classifies memory representations by deletion affordance. The IPG reveals that deletion fails through multiple channels. Our benchmark, MemLeak, measures this across a deletion cascade: direct probing of deletion-capable systems yields <1%, but retained correlated text enables 18.3% recovery, and retained images enable 12.0% recovery (0.0% blind baseline, 0.3% FPR) -- with 47% of image leaks not text-recoverable. Content-aware semantic deletion reduces the image residual to 2.0%. The residual appears across multiple VLMs, a production memory system, and real Unsplash-licensed photographs. Dual-annotator human validation (kappa = 0.88) confirms judge reliability.

</details>


### [503] [What Drives the Inlier-Memorization Effect? A Theory of Outlier Detection via Early Training Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29791)
*Kunwoong Kim,Dongha Kim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文对自编码器在无监督异常检测中的内点记忆（IM）效应进行了理论研究，揭示了模型在早期训练阶段能够有效记忆正常数据而难以记忆异常数据的机制，并分析了该效应的出现、强度与持续性如何受数据分布和参数初始化的影响。基于这些发现，提出了改进IM效应的数据预处理与参数初始化策略，在ADBench数据集上取得了当前最优性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管内点记忆（IM）效应在无监督异常检测中表现出色，但其理论基础尚不清晰，缺乏对为何以及如何在训练初期区分正常与异常样本的深入理解。因此，亟需一个理论框架来解释该现象并指导实践优化。

Method: 通过构建一个简单的自编码器模型，在温和假设下分析早期训练过程中模型对内点和外点的记忆能力差异，利用数学推导刻画IM效应的出现条件、强度及持久性，并进一步探讨其与数据分布和初始参数的关系。

Result: 理论证明了在特定条件下，自编码器在早期训练阶段能成功记忆内点但无法记忆外点；同时发现数据分布特性与参数初始化方式显著影响IM效应的表现。基于此提出的具体优化策略在ADBench数据集上实现了最先进的异常检测性能。

Conclusion: 本研究为内点记忆效应提供了坚实的理论支撑，不仅加深了对其内在机制的理解，还给出了可操作的优化建议，推动了基于记忆机制的无监督异常检测方法的发展。

Abstract: Outlier detection (OD) aims to identify anomalous instances by learning the underlying structure of normal data (inliers), and is particularly challenging in fully unsupervised settings where no information about anomalies is available during training. Recent advances have leveraged the inlier-memorization (IM) effect, a phenomenon in which deep models memorize inlier patterns earlier than those of outliers, as a powerful signal for distinguishing outliers. However, despite its empirical success, the theoretical understanding of the IM effect remains limited. In this work, we present a theoretical study of the IM effect. Focusing on a simple autoencoder, we show that, under mild assumptions, the model can successfully memorize inliers while failing to memorize outliers during certain stages of early training. In particular, we characterize not only the emergence of the IM effect, but also its strength and persistence, and analyze how these properties depend on the data distribution and parameter initialization. In addition, building on these insights, we derive simple yet practical guidelines for enhancing the IM effect, including data preprocessing and parameter initialization schemes, achieving state-of-the-art performance on the ADBench datasets. Our findings provide a theoretical foundation for the IM effect and offer actionable directions for improving IM-based outlier detection methods.

</details>


### [504] [Accelerating Q-learning through Efficient Value-Sharing across Actions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29806)
*Prabhat Nagarajan,Brett Daley,Martha White,Marlos C. Machado*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出均值扩展层（mean-expansion layer），通过在状态内共享动作价值并学习低范数表示，加速深度强化学习中的动作价值学习。该方法无需修改算法，可作为参数自由模块加入Q网络架构，在57个Atari游戏中提升整体性能，增强动作差距并显著减少价值过估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统动作价值学习效率低，需大量更新才能从初始值（接近零）收敛到真实值（可能远离零），且各状态-动作对独立更新，缺乏跨动作的共享价值结构。

Method: 引入均值扩展层，通过在状态内共享动作价值，并将学习大数值动作价值的问题转化为学习低范数表示，从而加速收敛。该层可无参数地嵌入现有Q网络架构中。

Result: 在深度Q网络和隐式分位数网络上应用后，均值扩展层在57个Atari游戏上提升了整体性能，增强了动作间隙，显著降低了价值过估计。

Conclusion: 均值扩展层有效加速了动作价值学习，提高了深度强化学习的效率与稳定性，是一种通用且高效的改进方法。

Abstract: Action-values are foundational to many control algorithms such as Q-learning. Therefore learning action-values efficiently is central to reinforcement learning (RL). However, learning them can be slow, requiring many updates to move values from their initialization, typically near zero, to their true values, which may be far from zero. Moreover, action-value learning algorithms typically update each state-action pair independently, without learning shared value structure across actions within a state. In this paper, we address these inefficiencies by introducing the mean-expansion layer, which accelerates action-value learning by sharing values across actions within a state and by changing the problem from directly learning potentially large action-values to learning a lower-norm representation of them. In deep RL, this layer can be applied as a parameter-free addition to Q-network architectures without altering the underlying algorithm. Applied to deep Q-networks and implicit quantile networks, it improves aggregate performance across 57 Atari games while increasing action gaps and dramatically reducing value overestimation.

</details>


### [505] [Dual-Flow Reinforcement Learning with State-Aware Exploration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29820)
*Qijun Li,Zheng Fu,Qi Song,Yifei He,Weitao Zhou,Kun Jiang,Diange Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Dual-Flow RL框架，通过条件流匹配联合建模连续回报分布与多模态策略分布，实现可靠价值估计与持续多模态探索；引入熵-协方差探索调节器（ECER）实现状态感知的探索调控，显著提升在DeepMind Control Suite和Humanoid-Bench上的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在复杂连续控制任务中面临多模态动作与不确定回报分布的挑战，传统高斯值估计限制表达能力并导致偏差，而生成式策略常陷入模式崩溃且探索不足。

Method: 采用条件流匹配（CFM）联合建模连续回报分布与多模态策略分布，设计熵-协方差探索调节器（ECER）实现状态感知的探索调控。

Result: 在DeepMind Control Suite和Humanoid-Bench上取得当前最优性能，显著优于基于扩散和流的方法。

Conclusion: Dual-Flow RL通过联合建模回报与策略分布，并结合动态探索调节机制，有效解决了复杂连续控制中的多模态价值估计与探索难题。

Abstract: In complex continuous-control reinforcement learning tasks, multimodal optimal actions often coincide with uncertain, multimodal return distributions, making reliable value estimation and multimodal exploration challenging. Existing value estimation methods using unimodal Gaussians restrict expressiveness and yield biased estimates. Recent generative policies can represent multimodal actions but often collapse to a few modes and under-explore high-value areas of the action space. Motivated by these challenges, we propose Dual-Flow RL, a unified actor-critic framework that jointly models a continuous return distribution and a multimodal policy distribution using conditional flow matching (CFM). This design supports reliable value estimation and sustained multimodal exploration. To further enhance exploration, we introduce an Entropy-Covariance Exploration Regulator (ECER) that enables state-aware exploration regulation leveraging policy entropy and action-uncertainty covariance. Experiments on DeepMind Control Suite and Humanoid-Bench show that Dual-Flow RL achieves state-of-the-art performance on most tasks, significantly outperforming prior diffusion-based and flow-based methods.

</details>


### [506] [The Forgetting-Retention Dilemma: Certified Unlearning Theory in Continual Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29832)
*Yiting Hu,Lingjie Duan,Qian Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文建立了持续学习（CL）与机器遗忘之间的首个理论框架，提出最小化遗忘后过拟合风险的优化目标，并分解为CL过拟合风险和遗忘损失，揭示了保留历史知识与目标遗忘之间的根本权衡。在非凸模型下建立了CL过拟合风险的上界，并将基于梯度和基于海森的两种认证遗忘方法适配到CL场景。分析表明，梯度法虽在减少遗忘损失方面不如海森法，但存储开销几乎为零，因此提出一种混合策略，在降低存储成本的同时保持遗忘性能。实验验证了理论结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有认证遗忘算法无法有效处理持续学习中模型随动态数据累积演进的复杂性，缺乏理论基础支持。

Method: 构建CL环境下遗忘目标的数学形式，推导非凸模型下的CL过拟合风险上界，适配梯度与海森基认证遗忘方法，并设计混合策略以平衡存储与性能。

Result: 梯度法虽在遗忘损失控制上弱于海森法，但几乎无存储开销；混合策略可在低存储代价下维持良好遗忘性能，实验验证了理论结论。

Conclusion: 本文首次建立CL与机器遗忘的理论联系，提出有效的适配方法与混合策略，为隐私保护下的持续学习提供了新范式。

Abstract: Machine unlearning aims to eliminate the influence of specific data from trained models to safeguard privacy. However, this presents a significant challenge in the context of continual learning (CL), where models update sequentially on dynamic datasets. A major limitation is that current certified unlearning algorithms fail to account for the complex, cumulative model evolution inherent to CL framework. In this work, we establish the first theoretical foundation bridging CL and machine unlearning. We formulate the CL's unlearning objective as the minimization of post-unlearning excess risk, which decomposes into CL excess risk and unlearning loss, characterizing the fundamental trade-off between preserving historical knowledge and targeted forgetting. Under mild assumptions, we first establish an upper bound for the CL excess risk in non-convex models. We then adapt two certified unlearning approaches, gradient-based and Hessian-based, to the CL framework. Our analysis reveals that while the gradient-based approach is less effective than the Hessian-based method in minimizing unlearning loss, it offers the distinct advantage of nearly zero storage overhead for enabling unlearning. This insight motivates a hybrid strategy that reduces storage costs while maintaining post-unlearning performance. Experimental results further validate our theoretical findings.

</details>


### [507] [Theory of Continual Learning Against Data Poisoning Attacks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29841)
*Yiting Hu,Lingjie Duan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文构建了一个理论框架，分析基于正则化的持续学习（CL）中的策略性攻击与防御。通过将攻击者-防御者互动建模为在线零和博弈，揭示了在对手污染线性比例任务时，任何防御手段均无法成功；随后针对稀疏攻击和每轮攻击噪声有界两种场景，分别提出任务间验证机制和鲁棒防御策略，有效降低累积偏差并加速收敛。实验验证了理论结果的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 持续学习在大语言模型和图像识别等领域广泛应用，但易受数据投毒攻击影响，导致学习发散或过量风险。现有研究缺乏对攻击与防御的系统性理论基础，亟需建立可解释的理论框架以指导实际防御设计。

Method: 将攻击者-防御者交互建模为在线零和博弈，分析不同攻击模式下的理论极限；针对稀疏攻击提出任务间验证机制，针对有界噪声攻击设计鲁棒防御策略，通过最小化模型对中毒特征的敏感性来提升鲁棒性与收敛速度。

Result: 证明了在对手污染线性比例任务且注入无界噪声或模式偏移时，所有防御手段均失效；在稀疏攻击和有界噪声场景下，所提方法显著降低累积偏差、加速模型收敛，实验结果支持理论发现。

Conclusion: 本研究建立了持续学习中对抗性攻击与防御的理论基础，揭示了防御的固有局限性，并提出了两类可行的应对策略，为未来鲁棒持续学习系统的设计提供了理论依据。

Abstract: Continual learning (CL), where a model is trained on a sequence of data tasks, is increasingly being adopted across key fields such as large language models and image recognition, yet it remains highly vulnerable to data poisoning that triggers learning divergence or severe excess risk. Despite these threats, a principled theoretical foundation in CL for understanding attack and defense remains lacking. In this paper, we develop a theoretical framework to analyze strategic attacks and defenses in regularization-based CL, a cornerstone of recent CL theory. By framing the adversary-defender interaction as an online zero-sum game, we first establish a fundamental performance limit: no defense succeeds when an adversary poisons a linear proportion of tasks by injecting unbounded noise or pattern shifts in regularization-based CL. We then analyze two possibly defensible scenarios: infrequent attacks and bounded noise per attack. For the former regime, we propose a task-to-task verification mechanism to detect data poisoning and reduce cumulative bias for learning convergence. For the latter regime, we derive a robust defense that minimizes the model's sensitivity to poisoned features, provably accelerating the convergence rate. Extensive experiments on realistic tasks further validate our theoretical results.

</details>


### [508] [Comparing Chatbot Performance Enhanced with Persistent Homology](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29857)
*Nithisha Raghavaraju,Barbara Giunti,Bastian Rieck*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究如何通过持久同调（PH）向量化增强聊天机器人的输入数据，以在小规模或受限数据集上提升性能，尤其适用于隐私敏感领域如心理健康支持。实验表明，尽管并非总是有效，但在某些情况下能显著提升模型表现且几乎无额外成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在特定领域（如心理健康）训练聊天机器人时，面临数据稀缺和患者隐私保护的双重挑战。现有大规模训练数据难以获取，且涉及个人隐私的数据无法在共享服务器上使用，因此需要一种无需增加数据量即可提升模型性能的方法。

Method: 利用持久同调（PH）对原始数据进行向量化处理，生成增强型输入特征，并将其用于训练聊天机器人模型。通过对比不同模型在有无PH增强条件下的表现，评估其有效性。

Result: 实验结果显示，PH增强在某些情况下能显著提升聊天机器人性能，而在其他情况下效果不明显。整体而言，该方法具有低成本、高灵活性的优势，尤其适合在数据受限或隐私要求高的场景中应用。

Conclusion: 持久同调向量化是一种有效的数据增强策略，能够在不增加数据量的前提下提升聊天机器人在受限数据环境中的表现，具备实际应用潜力，尤其是在医疗等隐私敏感领域。

Abstract: Chatbots have become increasingly prevalent across various domains, offering automated assistance in many areas, especially mental health support. The training is done using extremely large datasets, which are sometimes not available in very specific domains. Moreover, it would sometimes be ideal to train the chatbot with personal information about the patients, which, of course, cannot be done on shared servers since it would violate patient confidentiality. Hence, being able to improve the performance of a chatbot, possibly trained locally and on a restricted dataset, without having to increase the dataset itself, would be extremely beneficial. In this work, we will enhance the input datasets using persistent homology (PH) vectorizations computed from the raw datasets themselves.
